name: Team Scott Fitzgerald
subject: Drugs at the border up 300% – CRISIS!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
What we're doing to help, and how the Democrats are standing in the way When an illegal drug like fentanyl crosses our border, it's for sale in our communities later that week.And _**death, devastation, overdoses, gang violence**_ and **_fear_** are never far behind.Congressman Fitzgerald is FIGHTING the scourge of drug smuggling, human trafficking, and worse on our border - even as the Democrats turn a blind eye! [Will you join us?](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-muiultl-ahkdjtlkr-r/) [[ JOIN CONGRESSMAN FITZGERALD ] - Donate Online Immediately](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-muiultl-ahkdjtlkr-y/) It's bad. And it's getting WORSE.
* More**fentanyl has been seized** at the border so far this year than all of 2020.
* Border crossing enforcement is**up 600%** compared to the same time last year.
* Border crossings last month marked a **20-year high. **

Congressman Fitzgerald is pushing in Congress to FIX the problem, not ignore it. That's why he introduced the **SOFA Act** , to PERMANENTLY designate fentanyl as a Schedule I drug and stop the cartels from flooding the drug markets with it. That's why he also supported the **See the Crisis Act, **which would cancel all international trips by Kamala Harris until she goes to the border and speaks with Border Patrol officers on the ground. Of course, the Democrats blocked our bill. Today, we need to help our COMMUNITIES, not the cartels. [**Please, click here immediately to support Congressman Fitzgerald and FIGHT BACK against the Democrats' failures on the border!**](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-muiultl-ahkdjtlkr-j/)-Team Fitzgerald [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-muiultl-ahkdjtlkr-t/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-muiultl-ahkdjtlkr-i/) | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress

We Must Fight Back |

---
| | Hi Peter,

My name is Christopher Ekstrom, and I am the conservative businessman and donor with the DC Drain the Swamp PAC. We are America First patriots delivering accountability to Congress, [with your help](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=1231d43da8&e=ba6e67b849)!

**Apparently betraying President Trump, and the country, wasn't good enough for the "7 Romneys". **

Now they are betraying the country AGAIN, this time by spending MORE money we don't have on an "infrastructure" package we don't need.

And leading the pack, again, is Mitt Romney himself:

_Romney is poised to play a significant role in crafting a bipartisan deal. Elected in 2018, Romney has stood out among Republican senators for his criticism and opposition to former President Donald Trump. Romney twice voted to convict the president when the Senate put him on trial for impeachment charges in 2020 and 2021.

Romney, a former Massachusetts governor, ran unsuccessfully as the GOP’s presidential nominee in 2012.

He’s now making a bid to cut a deal with the Democratic White House, telling reporters the group is trying to move swiftly to reach a deal.

Biden lowered the cost of his plan in a bid to appeal to the GOP, offering a $1.7 trillion package that was reduced in price by cutting the traditional infrastructure spending Republicans support._

Joe Biden has already brought the Trump recovery to a close, and inflation is already crushing the American People by robbing them of their purchasing power. His unnecessary and wildly irresponsible debt spending is crushing us!

And now, Mitt Romney, Lisa Murkowski, Bill Cassidy, and the "7 Romneys" are assisting Biden to spend even MORE.

_Let us remember what Democrat Senator Kirsten Gillibrand of New York thought was "infrastructure"!_

Senators like BILL CASSIDY from Louisiana must be put on notice that betraying President Trump will not be forgiven or forgotten. My friends in Louisiana need a good candidate to kick Cassidy to the curb!

_We need to start NOW to unseat these faithless RINOs. If we take a couple of scalps among them, it will scare the rest back into line!_

[We need to make them respect the voters who put them there!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=1913893076&e=ba6e67b849)

name: Hala Ayala
subject: Medicaid saved my life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hala for Virginia
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30937896/291092179/40582973?refcode=hla-em-210616-medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDcwNmNmMC02YmNmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xWfzH5y3jrjG6zC3iVKbYOTrzJmtNzTuJE3AZzjflVg=&emci=65e767b7-14cf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d0706cf0-6bcf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18668076)
---
Peter — In a moment, **[I’m going to ask you to sign my petition demanding that the Commonwealth expand Medicaid. But first, I want to share a story with you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30937898/291092181/-719569639?refcode=hla-em-210616-medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDcwNmNmMC02YmNmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xWfzH5y3jrjG6zC3iVKbYOTrzJmtNzTuJE3AZzjflVg=&emci=65e767b7-14cf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d0706cf0-6bcf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18668076)** It’s long, but important — and I hope you will take the time to read it. I was 24 years old and working at a gas station when I found out I was pregnant. I was young, scared, and had no health insurance. At the hospital, I faced life-threatening complications and I wasn’t sure if my son and I would survive the night — thanks to Medicaid, we did. When Donald Trump was elected President of the United States, I knew I had to do something because the communities and institutions — like Medicaid — that helped my family through those difficult times would be under attack. So, I did the only thing I could: **I quit my job, cashed in my retirement savings, and ran for the Virginia House of Delegates.** I was elected as part of a Blue Wave that wiped out the Republican supermajority in the State House. And once we took the majority, we got to work delivering on our promises — including expanding Medicaid for 500,000 Virginians. Now, the people of Virginia once again have a choice. We simply can't afford Republican leaders who will roll back our progress, and strip away affordable care and essential protections for folks with pre-existing conditions. In the House, I stood up against right-wing attacks and passed progressive laws, but this fight isn’t over yet — more than 700,000 Virginians still do not have access to health insurance. **As Lt. Governor, I'll ensure we continue our progress by further expanding Medicaid, lowering prescription drug prices, and ensuring that every Virginian has access to care no matter their zip code — I’m asking for your support on this.** **[Will you add your name to my petition demanding the Commonwealth expand Medicaid? 700,000 Virginians are uninsured, let’s change that.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30937899/291092183/-719569639?refcode=hla-em-210616-medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDcwNmNmMC02YmNmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xWfzH5y3jrjG6zC3iVKbYOTrzJmtNzTuJE3AZzjflVg=&emci=65e767b7-14cf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d0706cf0-6bcf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18668076)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30937900/291092186/-719569639?refcode=hla-em-210616-medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDcwNmNmMC02YmNmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xWfzH5y3jrjG6zC3iVKbYOTrzJmtNzTuJE3AZzjflVg=&emci=65e767b7-14cf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d0706cf0-6bcf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18668076)
---
Medicaid saved my life, and I won’t stop fighting until every Virginian has access to quality, affordable health care.
Thanks for reading and taking action.
— Hala
As a lifelong Virginian, Hala understands where we’ve come from and embodies the diversity of our future. She’s running for Lt. Governor because she knows we have the power to move forward together, and she knows what it’ll take to get it done. **Will you pitch in to join our movement for a brighter future for all?** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30937901/291092188/1546086982?refcode=hla-em-210616-medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDcwNmNmMC02YmNmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xWfzH5y3jrjG6zC3iVKbYOTrzJmtNzTuJE3AZzjflVg=)

clean_body: | Peter — In a moment, It’s long, but important — and I hope you will take the time to read it. I was 24 years old and working at a gas station when I found out I was pregnant. I was young, scared, and had no health insurance. At the hospital, I faced life-threatening complications and I wasn’t sure if my son and I would survive the night — thanks to Medicaid, we did. When Donald Trump was elected President of the United States, I knew I had to do something because the communities and institutions — like Medicaid — that helped my family through those difficult times would be under attack. So, I did the only thing I could: I quit my job, cashed in my retirement savings, and ran for the Virginia House of Delegates. I was elected as part of a Blue Wave that wiped out the Republican supermajority in the State House. And once we took the majority, we got to work delivering on our promises — including expanding Medicaid for 500,000 Virginians. Now, the people of Virginia once again have a choice. We simply can't afford Republican leaders who will roll back our progress, and strip away affordable care and essential protections for folks with pre-existing conditions. In the House, I stood up against right-wing attacks and passed progressive laws, but this fight isn’t over yet — more than 700,000 Virginians still do not have access to health insurance. As Lt. Governor, I'll ensure we continue our progress by further expanding Medicaid, lowering prescription drug prices, and ensuring that every Virginian has access to care no matter their zip code — I’m asking for your support on this. | Medicaid saved my life, and I won’t stop fighting until every Virginian has access to quality, affordable health care. Thanks for reading and taking action. — Hala As a lifelong Virginian, Hala understands where we’ve come from and embodies the diversity of our future. She’s running for Lt. Governor because she knows we have the power to move forward together, and she knows what it’ll take to get it done. Will you pitch in to join our movement for a brighter future for all? | = | Paid for by Hala for Virginia Hala for Virginia P.O. Box 7434 Woodbridge, VA 22195 United States

| | Peter, **I want to talk about violence here in America, specifically gun violence, and how basically every day is now the anniversary of a mass shooting.** A "mass shooting" is when four or more people are shot. Now that we're reopening from the pandemic, the mass shootings have picked up as well. From June 1st to the 14th there were 30 mass shootings in this country. Through June 11th, 25 children in Philadelphia were killed due to gun violence — children! Are you willing to accept this as part of "getting back to normal"? I'm sure as _hell_ not, even if too many politicians in Washington D.C. _are._ [**Join our campaign for the U.S. Senate to take on gun violence in 2022.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30949457/291117299/-34735242?refcode=2021-06-16-shootings&recurring=0&amount=5&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=7d2c3408-75cf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDJjMzQwOC03NWNmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=es4ImTuABBQ1fgPPMSDmjDkW8-iHQe-nwL6KFqGTss0=) It drives me up a wall when I hear the terms "thoughts and prayers" in response to these killings. Or when we are told "now is not the time" to act, that it is "too soon". As we've discussed, too many career politicians don't want to solve problems – they feed on those problems and raise obscene amounts of money on those problems. When they say "it's too soon," they mean "it's too soon to ask me to stop hitting up the NRA for piles of campaign cash." Taking on special interests, like the NRA, is central to my campaign for the U.S. Senate. Because we need to start to solve our problems, and for all we've talked about gun violence lately, how much better are things? I'm tired of the hypocrites who wouldn't dare allow a stranger with a gun into their neighborhood, but who raise money by boasting that those same guns belong in our supermarkets, churches, and name: Nikki Fried
subject: I'm running to defeat Ron DeSantis
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

From my time as a public defender to my first run for office three years ago, I’ve been underestimated my entire life.

In 2018, they said a Democrat from Miami couldn’t be elected Commissioner of Agriculture. We won — and then we got to work.

As Florida’s only statewide elected Democrat, I’ve taken on the NRA, fought climate change, legalized hemp, confronted historic racism, and stood up for your rights. But like so many of you, I’ve run up against Florida’s corrupt system every time I’ve fought for change.

Just imagine what we can accomplish if we break the whole rigged system in Florida. We can end decades of corruption in Tallahassee and build a state that gives power back to you.

I’m running because after more than 20 years of Republican governors, it’s time for something new. If you’re ready to stop Ron DeSantis, break Florida’s corrupt system, and try something new, click here to endorse our campaign today. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ZVukcx-Vb0CVnLW4t-rnOQ2]

On marijuana legalization, climate change, healthcare, and so much more, Republicans have blocked our will and our ballot. When they don’t get their way, they change the rules.
I’m running for governor to put Floridians first — not party, not political ambition, not rich donors. I know this won’t be easy and that’s why I need your help.

I’m unafraid, I’m tested, and I’m ready, but I can’t do this without you. If you’re ready for something new and ready to win, click here to endorse our campaign today. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ZVukcx-Vb0CVnLW4t-rnOQ2]

With Thanks,
Nikki

Miami, FL 33143

name: Mark Brnovich
subject: Sheep don't make it in the desert.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brnovich for Senate
body:
Soft, skittish, blindly follows...I'm talking about Mark Kelly of course.
If you wish to unsubscribe, [click here](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/10024285/224717773/2036/1/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5hbWVyaWNhc25ld3NsZXR0ZXIuY29tL3U%2faWQ9MjI0NzE3NzczLjhkZjc4NzE1ODQwOGE3NzA4OTMwYWNmMTRjZjJjYTljJm49VCZsPWEtbWFzdGVybGlzdF9yaWdodC1wYXRoXzEwMTQ5OSZvPTEwMDI0Mjg1&x=4615e45e)

Friend, soft, skittish, blindly follows---I'm talking about Mark Kelly, of course.

I'm running for U.S. Senate to tackle the border crisis created by weak leaders like Mark Kelly, on the orders of Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi.
****[**BECOME A FOUNDING MEMBER OF THE BRNO BRIGADE**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/10024285/224717773/203209/3/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=409f4b7d)****
---

Our nation's greatest principled conservatives have called Arizona home---but---**in just two years Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi have gained a stranglehold on our state, and a Senate Majority using Mark Kelly, a progressive in disguise.**

The Democrats' leftward shift and failed immigration policies have seen over two-million people pour across our southern border more than the population of Alaska, Wyoming and Vermont combined---this is unacceptable.

Mark Kelly promised border security---**Arizona received open borders.**

Mark Kelly promised moderacy---**Arizona got progressivism.**

This isn't the Arizona way of life---and **I'm running to restore principled Arizona conservatism to the U.S. Senate.**
****[**BECOME A FOUNDING MEMBER OF THE BRNO BRIGADE**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/10024285/224717773/203209/4/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=c373e383)****
---

We have one shot, one chance to get it right---that's why I'm reaching out to you, Friend. [**Will you join our campaign by midnight tonight and help me take Arizona's fight---your fight---to the U.S. Senate?**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/10024285/224717773/203208/5/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=7f436e2e)

---

Thank you patriot,

Mark Brnovich

name: Ras Smith
subject: Come as you are
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30954478/291138401/1836405079?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210617fd_rs_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmE2ODgwMi04MmNmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CrUFBZYUwnEFEt6Doyd0yvcrnaxaETGJ2YxlS13CfrA=)

Friends, I remember one Easter, some folks at my family’s congregation said they couldn’t come to church because they couldn’t afford to buy and wear their “Sunday best.” My mom, our pastor, got right on the phone and told them, _“No, no no, just come as you are.”_ That stuck with me. That Easter, my parents wore jeans and t-shirts to church. They didn’t want clothes or money to be the barrier for folks attending church and participating in the community. **So today, I’m inviting you all to be a part of this campaign, this movement, and to “come as you are.”** You don’t have to be perfect or have it all figured out. You don’t need to have fear about saying the wrong thing. You don’t have to wear a cape or have an S on your chest. I don’t care when you last voted or who you voted for. I just need your commitment to work for a better Iowa, however you can. As I run for governor, I look to Iowa’s long history of standing up for what’s right. We have a heritage of courage. From desegregating schools before the federal government, to embracing wind energy, to recognizing that love is love — Iowans should be proud of our heritage. Together, I know that Iowans have the innovation and the spirit to find solutions to our common struggles. We can invest in not just schools, but in every single student’s needs. We can provide opportunities for folks to make not just $15 an hour, but $50,000 a year so they can start looking beyond the next paycheck and plan for the next generation. **This is a people-powered movement that will rely on grassroots support.** **[That’s why I ask: will you chip in $5 or whatever you can afford today to become a founding donor of this campaign? It would mean so much to me to have you on board.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30954479/291138402/1836405079?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210617fd_rs_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmE2ODgwMi04MmNmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CrUFBZYUwnEFEt6Doyd0yvcrnaxaETGJ2YxlS13CfrA=)** [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30954480/291138403/1836405079?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210617fd_rs_full_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmE2ODgwMi04MmNmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CrUFBZYUwnEFEt6Doyd0yvcrnaxaETGJ2YxlS13CfrA=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

body:
The VA Gov race will be a close one.
| | |

| | _Virginia’s Governor’s race**“will star Donald Trump.”** \-- Bloomberg, June 9, 2021_ Election experts agree: the 2021 Virginia Governor’s race is a test of Donald Trump’s power over the Republican Party.

name: Team Kilmer
subject: American Families Plan (survey request)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

Earlier this year, President Biden unveiled the American Families Plan. This comprehensive package would make college more affordable, provide direct support to families to help cover the cost of childcare, extend tax cuts for families with children, and so much more.

Derek has always been an advocate for our nation's families, and he's consistently fought hard for increased investments in education. That's why he's a strong supporter of the American Families Plan. **But it 's important to Derek that he hears directly from you about this issue.**

**[Derek wants to know how you think we can best support America's families and children. Will you take his short American Families Plan survey today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/akpQXW62YquQ35jeobE9TrvDHepJ-dFL7fl4WGUztuY=/XdVpHGfCyEimVXZHYiD9GTVrkluUdHta2whRZBlrTLQ=?gpsid=50_115_19426&ms=em21_210617_AmrFam_engg_gq_act__TK_ettx&refcode=em21_210617_AmrFam_engg_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210617_AmrFam_engg_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**
**Which do you think should be our main priority for supporting American families and children?**

Investing in education
Making college more affordable
Providing universal preschool
Helping families pay for childcare
Extending tax breaks for families with children
Creating a national paid family and medical leave program
Providing two years of free community college
Providing more nutrition assistance
Other
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.myngp.com/el/akpQXW62YquQ35jeobE9TrvDHepJ-dFL7fl4WGUztuY=/XdVpHGfCyEimVXZHYiD9GTVrkluUdHta2whRZBlrTLQ=?gpsid=50_115_19426&ms=em21_210617_AmrFam_engg_gq_act__TK_ettx&refcode=em21_210617_AmrFam_engg_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210617_AmrFam_engg_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)
Investing in our nation's children and families isn't just the right thing to do, it's the smart thing to do. Research shows that access to early childhood education, paid family leave, and other similar programs can have tremendous benefits for our economy and country as a whole.

Derek will always fight for America's children and a better future for all of our families. **[Let him know how you want to see him fighting for your family by taking this short survey today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/akpQXW62YquQ35jeobE9TrvDHepJ-dFL7fl4WGUztuY=/XdVpHGfCyEimVXZHYiD9GTVrkluUdHta2whRZBlrTLQ=?gpsid=50_115_19426&ms=em21_210617_AmrFam_engg_gq_act__TK_ettx&refcode=em21_210617_AmrFam_engg_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210617_AmrFam_engg_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

Thank you,

Team Kilmer

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/akpQXW62YquQ35jeobE9TrvDHepJ-dFL7fl4WGUztuY=/6sRgDr5okKRyyrioeMuC0lb0dVX61GBJ6AOTDtBj5l8=?gpsid=50_115_19428&refcode=em21_210617_AmrFam_engg_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210617_AmrFam_engg_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)

name: Marco (personal)
subject: my request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
Friend, I have some concerning news: We're still 14 responses short of what we need to fight back against the Arizona GOP's sham election audit. Before it's too late: Will you join me now in condemning Republican attempts to overturn the 2020 election?

https://surveys.signforgood.com/lopez-election-audit2?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk119-su-text

Not only are extremist Republicans like Kelli Ward trying to steal the election from President Biden – but they've also hired QAnon-supporting conspiracy theorists to "recount" millions of ballots.
I mean, friend – we just heard their "big strategy" is to look for bamboo in the ballot papers, all because they heard a conspiracy theory that China tried to rig our election for Joe Biden. It's completely ridiculous – but if we don't speak up and call this audit the sham that it is, then the GOP may succeed in casting doubt on President Biden's victory.
That's why I need to hear from you so urgently. Please, we only have a few hours left before we close this poll, so speak out right now:

Will you condemn the Arizona GOP's sham "election audit" and defend our democracy against these baseless, outrageous attacks?

YES - https://surveys.signforgood.com/lopez-election-audit2?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk119-su-text

NO - https://surveys.signforgood.com/lopez-election-audit2?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk119-su-text

Thank you,
Marco

From: Rachel Maddow Alert (via Team Lopez)
Date: Wed, June 16, 2021
Subject: the end of democracy

RACHEL MADDOW'S WARNING FOR DEMOCRATS:
ARIZONA GOP'S SHAM ELECTION AUDIT COULD LEAD TO THE "END OF DEMOCRACY"

SPEAK OUT NOW: WILL YOU CONDEMN THE ARIZONA GOP'S SHAM "ELECTION AUDIT" AND DEFEND OUR DEMOCRACY?

YES - https://surveys.signforgood.com/lopez-election-audit2?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk119-su-text

NO - https://surveys.signforgood.com/lopez-election-audit2?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk119-su-text

Friend, this may be the most outrageous attack on our democracy yet.

Extremists in the Arizona GOP – led by Kelli Ward – are currently recounting millions of ballots in a sham "election audit" – all to overturn President Joe Biden's historic victory in Arizona!

Even worse? They've hired a QAnon-supporting, conspiracy theorist group to conduct the recount in secret . Let's be clear: They're not trying to make our elections more secure. They're still trying to push Trump's Big Lie, steal the election from President Biden and rig the system so Democrats can never win in Arizona again. And we need to fight back NOW – or, as Rachel Maddow warns, it could be the END OF DEMOCRACY as we know it.

Democrats across the country are speaking out against this anti-democratic attack on our elections – but we still don't know where you stand, friend. We're counting on another 26 concerned Democrats from 18326 to make their voices heard before tonight's midnight deadline, so please:

WILL YOU CONDEMN THE ARIZONA GOP'S SHAM "ELECTION AUDIT" AND DEFEND OUR DEMOCRACY?

https://surveys.signforgood.com/lopez-election-audit2?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk119-su-text

11:59 P.M. DEADLINE | COMPLETION RATE IN 18326: 99.1%

Your voice is critical in this fight, friend. Thank you.

– Team Lopez

name: Chris Palombi
subject: Let me tell you about Steny . . .
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Palombi for Congress Contributions to Palombi for Congress are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes
body:
When I moved to Maryland in 1987 as a child, Democrat Steny Hoyer was my Congressman.
| | | [](https://washington.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ep5y892g04i3XkNcnG892fj0XA/xiIXNiIwQk9M5U8e4b5892Jg) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Palombi for Congress.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://washington.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ep5y892g04i3XkNcnG892fj0XA/xiIXNiIwQk9M5U8e4b5892Jg)**.
---

---
| [](https://washington.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ep5y892g04i3XkNcnG892fj0XA/xiIXNiIwQk9M5U8e4b5892Jg)
Patriot,

[](https://washington.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ep5y892g04i3XkNcnG892fj0XA/xiIXNiIwQk9M5U8e4b5892Jg) When I moved to Maryland in 1987 as a child, Democrat Steny Hoyer was my Congressman.

Today, I'm running against him, and [**I 'm asking for your support**](https://washington.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ep5y892g04i3XkNcnG892fj0XA/xiIXNiIwQk9M5U8e4b5892Jg).

While Steny Hoyer worked his way to be the second in command in the Democrat-controlled house over the past 40 years, I went to college, spent five years as a Capitol Hill Police Officer and went to work as a consultant for a top national firm.

Today, I'm a father of three, a self-taught web programmer, and a hockey coach - where I take pride in building a program that not only has won multiple championships, but also forming the first all-girls hockey team in southern Maryland.

Growing up with my heroic single mother, I've seen nearly every aspect of what it means to be American. I've struggled, worked hard, and built a life for myself and my family.

All the while I was doing that, Steny Hoyer continued to build his career as well, becoming known as the "Lobbyist's Congressman."

**Hoyer has been an elected politician since 1966 - 55 years!**

The only other job Steny Hoyer has held was working for a Democrat Senator and guess who he shared an office with? Young Nancy Pelosi who was also a staffer for Senator Daniel Brewster.

Brewster was eventually convicted for accepting bribes as a Senator.

After learning the ropes from a corrupt politician, Steny Hoyer sought office himself and has held his positions of power for over half a century.

That's just insane to me that a man with no real world experience is writing the laws for the rest of us and has been doing it longer than I've been alive.

[**Steny has to go and I 'm going to need your support to make that happen.**](https://washington.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ep5y892g04i3XkNcnG892fj0XA/xiIXNiIwQk9M5U8e4b5892Jg)

Even if you don't live in Maryland, you should support my race. Here's why:
**STENY HOYER IS MAJORITY WHIP FOR NANCY PELOSI**
Hoyer is Pelosi's enforcer. He's the one who gives Nancy her power, protects her, and does her bidding.

Take away Hoyer, and Pelosi couldn't even make it to the office on her own. It would throw Democrat leadership into complete disarray and the less they get done, the better off America is.

Please, [**make the decision to support my run**](https://washington.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ep5y892g04i3XkNcnG892fj0XA/xiIXNiIwQk9M5U8e4b5892Jg) and help defeat the second most powerful Democrat in Congress.

Respectfully,

Chris Palombi

clean_body: When I moved to Maryland in 1987 as a child, Democrat Steny Hoyer was my Congressman. | | | | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Palombi for Congress. We encourage you to. | Patriot, When I moved to Maryland in 1987 as a child, Democrat Steny Hoyer was my Congressman. Today, I'm running against him, and . While Steny Hoyer worked his way to be the second in command in the Democrat-controlled house over the past 40 years, I went to college, spent five years as a Capitol Hill Police Officer and went to work as a consultant for a top national firm. Today, I'm a father of three, a self-taught web programmer, and a hockey coach - where I take pride in building a program that not only has won multiple championships, but also forming the first all-girls hockey team in southern Maryland. Growing up with my heroic single mother, I've seen nearly every aspect of what it means to be American. I've struggled, worked hard, and built a life for myself and my family. All the while I was doing that, Steny Hoyer continued to build his career as well, becoming known as the "Lobbyist's Congressman." Hoyer has been an elected politician since 1966 - 55 years! The only other job Steny Hoyer has held was working for a Democrat Senator and guess who he shared an office with? Young Nancy Pelosi who was also a staffer for Senator Daniel Brewster. Brewster was eventually convicted for accepting bribes as a Senator. After learning the ropes from a corrupt politician, Steny Hoyer sought office himself and has held his positions of power for over half a century. That's just insane to me that a man with no real world experience is writing the laws for the rest of us and has been doing it longer than I've been alive. Even if you don't live in Maryland, you should support my race. Here's why: STENY HOYER IS MAJORITY WHIP FOR NANCY PELOSI Hoyer is Pelosi's enforcer. He's the one who gives Nancy her power, protects her, and does her bidding. Take away Hoyer, and Pelosi couldn't even make it to the office on her own. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: "Fauci, you're fired"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene
body:
Peter -- Fauci lied. People died. And you and I must hold him
accountable!
My bill to Fire Fauci is gaining steam but we
must keep up the pressure. . .
Marjorie Taylor Greene's Fire Fauci Act
Doubles its Co-Sponsors After Email Dump

Thanks to the Citizen Cosponsors to my Fire
Fauci Act, you and I have doubled the number of cosponsors to my
"Fire Fauci Act!"
We must keep up the pressure and force
Fauci's firing. But we must have more Citizen Cosponsors!
Will you chip in $25 right now and help
me keep up the pressure?

CHIP IN $25 TO HELP FIRE FAUCI NOW!

Anthony Fauci did everything he could, along
with the Democrats, Big Tech and the Fake News Media to TANK
President Trump's booming economy and defeat him in the 2020
election.

And now, we know Fauci approved American
tax-dollars to fund "research" at the Wuhan lab!
Fauci misled the American people and we
Americans can no longer afford Fauci's Pandemic Reign of Terror.
Fauci is out of control and must be FIRED!

FIRE FAUCI NOW!
Fauci has been wrong at nearly every turn
about the China Virus. His actions have resulted in misery for
millions of Americans.
The bill I introduced today, the "Fire Fauci
Act," reduces his salary to $0 (he's the highest-paid federal
employee in the country -- more than POTUS) and increases
transparency for the NIAID office in what they knew, when they
knew it, and how they responded.

-- Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

name: Rick Larsen
subject: The attacks on our democracy have to stop
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
|
---
| | It has been a year since we lost civil rights legend and U.S. Representative John Lewis. **During my time in Congress, John Lewis was always someone I looked to as a guiding light. His moral compass? Always true. His work ethic? Unrivaled. Serving with him in Congress was an honor.** In the year since John's passing, Republicans have been hard at work eroding our basic democratic rights. More often than not, these attacks have come against people in traditionally-marginalized communities. **It has played out in Georgia, in Florida, in Texas, and in so many other states: Republicans are making it harder for people to vote because, if more Americans vote, they lose.** That is not how democracy is supposed to work. In a democracy, there will be people who disagree with us. And in a democracy, sometimes the other side wins elections. But lately, it seems that there are politicians who do not believe that they should ever lose an argument or an election. That, somehow, if they lose then the election was rigged, or stolen, or invalid. I have been disheartened by these relentless attacks on our democracy. **But I have also been inspired to see the determination in the faces of everyday Americans who are not going to sit idly by while Republicans come after our basic rights.** This is the heart of HR 1 and the John Lewis Voting Rights Act: efforts to stabilize and restore rights that have been eroded and stripped from everyday Americans. **I am fighting to see that these bills pass and are signed into law, and I am calling on my friends in the U.S. Senate to move these priorities along without delay.** I know you are there with me in that fight. And, for that, I am grateful. _To John Lewis, his memory, and all that he fought for._ _Rick_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30961409/291166190/1596212816?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2021-06-17-johnlewis&refcode2=9d3f9beb-92cf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDNmOWJlYi05MmNmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5J9iXsm4mKw3pilerKg09v2Gc3sQdLnOlAPZInGjMhg=) | [$15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30961410/291166193/1596212816?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2021-06-17-johnlewis&refcode2=9d3f9beb-92cf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDNmOWJlYi05MmNmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5J9iXsm4mKw3pilerKg09v2Gc3sQdLnOlAPZInGjMhg=) | [$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30961411/291166194/1596212816?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2021-06-17-johnlewis&refcode2=9d3f9beb-92cf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDNmOWJlYi05MmNmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5J9iXsm4mKw3pilerKg09v2Gc3sQdLnOlAPZInGjMhg=) | [$50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30961412/291166195/1596212816?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2021-06-17-johnlewis&refcode2=9d3f9beb-92cf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDNmOWJlYi05MmNmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5J9iXsm4mKw3pilerKg09v2Gc3sQdLnOlAPZInGjMhg=)

name: Donald J. Trump Alerts via NCGOP
subject: President Trump is asking you, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by North Carolina Republican Party ([nc
body:
Are you ignoring him?
| Peter, President Trump is commanding Grassroots Republicans to get back into the fight. **President Trump:** _“The survival of America depends upon our ability to elect Republicans at every level, starting with the midterms next year. name: Greater Georgia
subject: GREATER GEORGIA ANNOUNCES THOUSANDS OF NEW REGISTRATIONS, HIGHLIGHTS ACCOMPLISHMENTS SINCE LAUNCH
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, JUNE 17, 2021
GREATER GEORGIA ANNOUNCES THOUSANDS OF NEW REGISTRATIONS, HIGHLIGHTS ACCOMPLISHMENTS SINCE LAUNCH
ATLANTA - Today, Greater Georgia announced that through its recent efforts, it has registered thousands of new conservative voters and achieved important milestones following launch. Since February, Greater Georgia has been working to register more voters, continuously engage diverse communities, and support election integrity in our state. To do that, the voter mobilization organization has been in the field engaging hundreds of thousands of voters, reaching out to diverse communities, holding elected officials accountable for restoring faith and integrity in our elections, and working to restore voter confidence.
"Greater Georgia set out to register new voters, engage more, diverse communities, stand up for election integrity, and stop the monopoly on voter mobilization by Stacey Abrams," said Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler. "In just four months, we've done that and more by building a strong foundation and delivering early results. From registering thousands of new voters to sharing our positive message with Georgians across our state and securing election integrity, we are leveraging our statewide network, experience and infrastructure to advance pro-growth policies that lift up every Georgia family. Although we have seen tremendous progress, there is still much more work to do to build out a comprehensive platform and to strengthen our elections and our state."
---
| Key metrics include:

* Registered thousands of new conservative voters
* Engaged over 170,000 registered but inactive conservative-leaning voters
* Reached over 700,000 Georgians to promote election integrity across the state
* Recruited over 150 volunteers to date for mobilization efforts, including to knock doors, make phone calls, write letters, and serve as poll watchers in upcoming elections
* Hosted six roundtables with community leaders from the African American, Hispanic American, Asian American and Pacific Islander, and Indian American communities
* Held eight events in six counties across the state to register new voters, recruit volunteers, and expand Greater Georgia's network to prepare for 2022
* Hosted nine training sessions with volunteers, many new to grassroots advocacy

---
| In addition to building the foundation for a voter mobilization network, Greater Georgia has addressed concerns of Georgians by standing up for fair elections:

clean_body: | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, JUNE 17, 2021 GREATER GEORGIA ANNOUNCES THOUSANDS OF NEW REGISTRATIONS, HIGHLIGHTS ACCOMPLISHMENTS SINCE LAUNCH ATLANTA - Today, Greater Georgia announced that through its recent efforts, it has registered thousands of new conservative voters and achieved important milestones following launch. Since February, Greater Georgia has been working to register more voters, continuously engage diverse communities, and support election integrity in our state. To do that, the voter mobilization organization has been in the field engaging hundreds of thousands of voters, reaching out to diverse communities, holding elected officials accountable for restoring faith and integrity in our elections, and working to restore voter confidence. "Greater Georgia set out to register new voters, engage more, diverse communities, stand up for election integrity, and stop the monopoly on voter mobilization by Stacey Abrams," said Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler. "In just four months, we've done that and more by building a strong foundation and delivering early results. From registering thousands of new voters to sharing our positive message with Georgians across our state and securing election integrity, we are leveraging our statewide network, experience and infrastructure to advance pro-growth policies that lift up every Georgia family. Although we have seen tremendous progress, there is still much more work to do to build out a comprehensive platform and to strengthen our elections and our state." | Key metrics include: Registered thousands of new conservative voters Engaged over 170,000 registered but inactive conservative-leaning voters Reached over 700,000 Georgians to promote election integrity across the state Recruited over 150 volunteers to date for mobilization efforts, including to knock doors, make phone calls, write letters, and serve as poll watchers in upcoming elections Hosted six roundtables with community leaders from the African American, Hispanic American, Asian American and Pacific Islander, and Indian American communities Held eight events in six counties across the state to register new voters, recruit volunteers, and expand Greater Georgia's network to prepare for 2022 Hosted nine training sessions with volunteers, many new to grassroots advocacy | In addition to building the foundation for a voter mobilization network, Greater Georgia has addressed concerns of Georgians by standing up for fair elections: == a mass-mobilization == to == awareness, registration, and mobilization for the special election for State House District 34 in Cobb County, outperforming the district's 2020 state house result by 3 percentage points == == the case to unseal and == Fulton County absentee ballots from November 2020 == an == == into Georgia Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger's actions Filed an open records request with Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger's office concerning the millions of dollars they received from CEIR, an organization founded by Mark Zuckerberg == a digital ad campaign in == of the Election Integrity Act (S.B. 202) and == the Georgia Legislature and Gov. Kemp for their efforts * == a billboard == == the MLB's decision to relocate the All Star game from Georgia based on lies about Georgia's voting law from Joe Biden, Stacey Abrams, and Raphael Warnock | | | | To learn more, visit ==, and follow along on ==, ==, and == to stay up to date with the latest information. | | | | | == | | | == | ### Media Contact: mailto:press@greatergeorgia.com | | | | Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | == | | | == == == | | Greater Georgia Action, Inc | P.O. name: Team Moulton
subject: AOC joined Seth Moulton yesterday to support high-speed rail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30965931/291181931/143679088?refcode=20210617_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjBjMThlZS05ZWNmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IX3x5Ym0POO9fH7oJ1m-Z3M5i07CXwiBmkvtXcRCVr4=) Friend, On Wednesday morning, outside Union Station, Senator Kirsten Gillibrand and Representatives Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Seth Moulton led a coalition of labor and climate leaders in calling for increased federal funding for high-speed rail in the upcoming infrastructure package. President Biden's infrastructure proposal, the American Jobs Plan, is the first step toward rebuilding America's crumbling infrastructure to the standards we already see in emerging economies like China and in the rest of the developed world. It’s a great first step, but there is still a lot of room for improvement. The current plan offers too many subsidies to out-dated cars, roads, and highways, and doesn’t invest enough in next-generation infrastructure like high-speed rail. **The plan includes $124 billion more for cars than rail and transit combined** —despite the fact that high-speed rail creates more jobs per dollar invested than road and highway projects. Just $80 billion is included in the package for all rail investments! Like Seth said, “With the American Jobs Plan we have a choice: Fix the last generation’s potholes, or invest in the next generation’s future.” We think the choice is clear! **If you agree with Representatives Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Seth Moulton, here are two things you can do right now to help:**
1. [**Go to fundhighspeedrail.org and tell your member or Senator to support high-speed rail**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30965932/291181932/-1659510963?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjBjMThlZS05ZWNmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IX3x5Ym0POO9fH7oJ1m-Z3M5i07CXwiBmkvtXcRCVr4=&emci=5775cb34-8fcf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=ab0c18ee-9ecf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=194769)
2. [**Split a contribution between Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Seth Moulton to help fuel their message about funding high-speed rail**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30965933/291181933/143679088?refcode=20210617_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjBjMThlZS05ZWNmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IX3x5Ym0POO9fH7oJ1m-Z3M5i07CXwiBmkvtXcRCVr4=)

A high-speed rail network will create millions of good, green, union jobs. And it can decarbonize the transportation sector by electrifying millions of daily commutes that currently rely on gas-guzzling cars, trucks, and airplanes. A nationwide high-speed rail network would also reduce traffic congestion on roads and highways—a big benefit to every driver in America. High-speed rail will also slash toxic air pollution in frontline communities, reduce the need for further highway expansions into those communities, create new affordable house opportunities, and revitalize small towns and rural areas across the country that have been left behind. Let’s get to work, —Team Moulton clean_body: | | | = Friend, On Wednesday morning, outside Union Station, Senator Kirsten Gillibrand and Representatives Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Seth Moulton led a coalition of labor and climate leaders in calling for increased federal funding for high-speed rail in the upcoming infrastructure package. President Biden's infrastructure proposal, the American Jobs Plan, is the first step toward rebuilding America's crumbling infrastructure to the standards we already see in emerging economies like China and in the rest of the developed world. It’s a great first step, but there is still a lot of room for improvement. The current plan offers too many subsidies to out-dated cars, roads, and highways, and doesn’t invest enough in next-generation infrastructure like high-speed rail. The plan includes $124 billion more for cars than rail and transit combined —despite the fact that high-speed rail creates more jobs per dollar invested than road and highway projects. Just $80 billion is included in the package for all rail investments! Like Seth said, “With the American Jobs Plan we have a choice: Fix the last generation’s potholes, or invest in the next generation’s future.” We think the choice is clear! If you agree with Representatives Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Seth Moulton, here are two things you can do right now to help: 1. 2. = A high-speed rail network will create millions of good, green, union jobs. And it can decarbonize the transportation sector by electrifying millions of daily commutes that currently rely on gas-guzzling cars, trucks, and airplanes. A nationwide high-speed rail network would also reduce traffic congestion on roads and highways—a big benefit to every driver in America. High-speed rail will also slash toxic air pollution in frontline communities, reduce the need for further highway expansions into those communities, create new affordable house opportunities, and revitalize small towns and rural areas across the country that have been left behind. Fellow Conservative,

name: Team AOC
subject: Alexandria is a key target
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We don’t know what the GOP will throw at us this year. But we must be prepared.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210617-2221-header&t=1&akid=2221%2E2526796%2EkpxRDl)
Last June, Alexandria faced _13 challengers_ who were vying for her seat in the primary. Next June, we could be facing the same crowded field.
Without a doubt, there will be another well-funded GOP challenger. Last year, her GOP opponent in the general election raised $425,000 in just 10 weeks after announcing his run on Fox & Friends. **By the end of the race, he’d raised $10 million to unseat her.**
He built his war chest from donors around the country, playing on Republican resentment of AOC. He hired leading Republican consultants, bought millions of dollars in advertisements, and distributed more than 700,000 pieces of mail to the district.
**The truth is, we don’t know what the GOP will throw at us this year.** That’s why we must be prepared and hit every goal to ensure we can execute our full plan to fight back against whatever the GOP throws at us.
**If everyone who reads this email chips in just $3, we'll get back on track to reach our end-of-quarter goal in no time. But we know that not everyone can respond right now. That's why we're really counting on you, if you're able to pitch in today.**
[If you're able, please make a donation of $3 or anything you can today. We're counting on your support to power our campaign and keep Alexandria in Congress.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210617-2?refcode=em20210617-2221-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2221_2526796_kpxRDl&akid=2221%2E2526796%2EkpxRDl)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210617-2?refcode=em20210617-2221-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2221_2526796_kpxRDl&akid=2221%2E2526796%2EkpxRDl)**
We couldn't do this without you.
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210617-2?refcode=em20210617-2221-P&t=23&refcode2=2221_2526796_kpxRDl&akid=2221%2E2526796%2EkpxRDl)**

name: Giffords.org
subject: Charleston
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends -
Six years ago today, a gunman attended a Bible study at the Emanuel AME Church for almost one hour, pulled out a gun, and murdered nine of the worshippers.
That day brought terror and pain to the people of Charleston.
Once again, a house of worship became a scene of tragedy.
There is something particularly heartbreaking about violence in a place in which we seek peace, comfort, and community.
If our sacred spaces aren’t safe, where is? As a nation, we must reckon with the fact that this type of mass violence is a uniquely American problem.
We must also recognize that it is within our power to do something about it.
The gun safety majority in the House of Representatives knew that when they took historic action to pass background checks and address the Charleston loophole in 2019.
But at the time, Mitch McConnell’s Senate instead chose to do the unthinkable...
Nothing at all.
Today, we have once again passed lifesaving legislation through the House—but Republicans in the Senate once again stand as the last barriers to signing it into law.
Almost 90 percent of Americans support universal background checks legislation that will make our communities safer.
Every moment we don’t act puts more Americans at risk. Places that should be safe, like our houses of worship, feel like they’re constantly under attack. This must change, and Congress has the power to change it.
Now we have a gun safety majority in the House and the Senate. It’s time for the leaders in the US Senate to pass H.R. 8, the Bipartisan Background Checks Act of 2021. It’s time for real action.
Thank you for standing with us,
The team at Giffords
**Sign our petition: tell Congress it’s time to pass legislation that will keep our communities safer from gun violence -- or we will elect a Congress that will.**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/ubc_petition?source=em210617-1-15&t=1&akid=235%2E3935704%2EDY0Ouo)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=235%2E3935704%2EDY0Ouo) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

| | | Friend — I wanted to make sure you saw the news: this morning the Supreme Court struck down a lawsuit started by Scott Walker. Had this GOP lawsuit been successful over half of Wisconsinites would have been put at risk of losing their health care coverage. I've always been a strong supporter of the Affordable Care Act, and I'm proud of what we were able to accomplish together with the passage of this landmark legislation. Today, I continue to build on the Affordable Care Act's achievements and fight to ensure more Americans have access to quality, affordable health care. Unfortunately, we know the fight is far from over and partisan games continue to put Wisconsinites' health care coverage at risk**.** While we celebrate this latest Supreme Court victory today, we must stay vigilant. [**_Can you chip in $25, so we can keep fighting to protect the Affordable Care Act? clean_body: | | | | | | | = | | | Friend — I wanted to make sure you saw the news: this morning the Supreme Court struck down a lawsuit started by Scott Walker. Had this GOP lawsuit been successful over half of Wisconsinites would have been put at risk of losing their health care coverage. I've always been a strong supporter of the Affordable Care Act, and I'm proud of what we were able to accomplish together with the passage of this landmark legislation. Today, I continue to build on the Affordable Care Act's achievements and fight to ensure more Americans have access to quality, affordable health care. Unfortunately, we know the fight is far from over and partisan games continue to put Wisconsinites' health care coverage at risk. While we celebrate this latest Supreme Court victory today, we must stay vigilant. = | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = = | | = = | | | | = = | | = = | | | | = = | | = = | | | | Thank you for your support, Ron Kind | | | | | | | = = | | | | To learn more about Ron Kind and moving Wisconsin forward visit . name: Karen Bass
subject: Open to your input
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Team, Derek Chauvin will be sentenced in eight days.

The trial and rightful sentencing of Derek Chauvin for the murder of George Floyd has represented our need for real, substantive, and transformative reform to our policing system.

Our justice system hasn't just allowed police officers to get away with the murder of unarmed Black people -- it has ensured it. **We must pass police reform so that accountability for brutality isn 't a surprise, it's expected. **

I introduced the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act, which passed through the House earlier this year, as our first step toward changing the system. I'm working to send this legislation to President Joe Biden's desk for a signature without delay. But that is one step of many.

Team, we have to keep the conversation about justice in policing wide open. There is more work to do to build a justice system that truly represents ALL Americans -- not just the white and the wealthy. So, I'm turning to you to hear your thoughts.

**[Will you take a few moments to share your top priorities for police reform in America? Please let me know what's most important to you and your community:](https://act.myngp.com/el/f4GYbfKfnPo9ODMinXZOWd-nCIgynngH4kbx2erOThA=/9iaXC0vaL2H_UDGwmrGexPbi378Yb35XNvruIwGK_MQ=?gpsid=39_132_19413&ms=em21_210617_jipa_adv_gq_act_svy_kb_ettx&refcode=em21_210617_jipa_adv_gq_act_svy_kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210617_jipa_adv_gq_act_svy_kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)**

[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.myngp.com/el/f4GYbfKfnPo9ODMinXZOWd-nCIgynngH4kbx2erOThA=/9iaXC0vaL2H_UDGwmrGexPbi378Yb35XNvruIwGK_MQ=?gpsid=39_132_19413&ms=em21_210617_jipa_adv_gq_act_svy_kb_ettx&refcode=em21_210617_jipa_adv_gq_act_svy_kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210617_jipa_adv_gq_act_svy_kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
---

The 24-hour news cycle may move on, but I won't stop fighting until we create a national standard for policing that will help save lives. I hope you're still with me in this important, necessary work.

In solidarity,

Karen

Karen Bass started as a community organizer, so she knows just how much a $5 or $10 donation can do. Help fuel her movement to make social and economic justice for all a reality by chipping in today.
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/f4GYbfKfnPo9ODMinXZOWd-nCIgynngH4kbx2erOThA=/D-76p2-zYozO4APr4b-L7xW7ZESzlNHiEgLpLXCWHUY=?gpsid=39_132_15877&refcode=em21_210617_jipa_adv_gq_act_svy_kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210617_jipa_adv_gq_act_svy_kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)
---

Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
---

Bass for Congress
918 Pennsylvania Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003 United States
We rely on this email to communicate with this grassroots team, but if you no longer want to receive our emails, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/f4GYbfKfnPo9ODMinXZOWd-nCIgynngH4kbx2erOThA=/Eb4sfGk16IcPPwb1r0Xwwok4jKrVipBoYJzCCnLsOf4=).

name: Mary Miller
subject: Fauci has to go NOW
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c140%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=c%2f7bLmbvOv9tg%2bfE22B5Jg&sysid=1)
Friend, It’s all finally being revealed - Dr. Anthony Fauci and Health Departments in states run by leftists have been distorting science to push their own big government agenda. What we’ve been saying all along has turned out to be true. As you and I have witnessed over the past couple of weeks, Fauci’s e-mails were exposed for the world to see. It’s become more and more apparent that Fauci has had no interest in the actual science. His early e-mails prove it! [**Which is why I’m asking you now to donate $35 or more to help me fight Dr. Fauci’s lies.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3433%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XCJOdzRehxWusb%2bP3B9vWQ&sysid=1) Fauci repeatedly stated in e-mails that masks do NOT prevent the spread of COVID-19 but until recently was telling us to wear two or three masks even after being vaccinated. **Now, Fauci has a book deal and is on magazine covers - for him, this was about fame, not science. ** ** ** Not only is Fauci getting free publicity for his lies - **he’s also the highest paid government employee, out-earning even the president.** ** ** That’s right - your tax dollars are going towards paying for this liar to take your freedoms and ruin our country. ** ** Which is why I’m backing my colleague Marjorie Taylor Greene with her “Fire Fauci” bill to reduce Fauci’s salary to zero _immediately._ _ _ [**I’m asking you now to donate $35 or more to support my fight against Dr. Fauci and the radical Left’s policies.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3434%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bMfwO4sJppnmGBwBmpIR1w&sysid=1) It’s clear - The lockdowns initiated at the behest of Fauci and the CDC were initiated to expand the power of radical politicians and limit our freedoms. My name is Mary Miller, and I’m sick and tired of the D.C. elites who continue to abuse their power and ignore our rights. Fauci and the far left have engaged in a draconian “rules for thee, but not for me” campaign for the last 15 months - and enough is enough. **They’ve been hiding the “science” from us because it wasn’t “science” at all.** ** ** It’s time to hold Fauci and state health departments accountable for their unconstitutional. economy-ruining orders. [**We can’t let Dr. Fauci be rewarded for his dangerous lies any longer. Please donate $35 or more to help me continue the fight to defund this villain.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3445%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VuUzOblB%2bXX4jRgLmaxTfw&sysid=1) It’s going to take patriots like you to come together and force Fauci and other leftists to step down or give up. Their lives have been exposed for the world to see, and if we don’t stand up for ourselves now, our very freedoms are at stake. Thank you for standing with me. Sincerely, Mary Miller Congresswoman (IL-15) [**DONATE TODAY**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3446%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cD0wQTpxmXjEJrWZQyp5Ag&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3447%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y58tSRVGvTN7CKIkbSGpcw&sysid=1) | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3448%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mlmXKW7esO0x7S0SgFE9Cw&sysid=1) | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3449%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eBIemuZJAnEuQWMtXh9Z6w&sysid=1) | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3440%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KET7uOW8XKTTP%2bLN%2foUHRw&sysid=1)

subject: This is our last chance to close the gap on our 10,000 donation goal

body:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Matt=20Royer?=
subject: about last tuesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by KTBBH PAC
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us8.campaign-archive.com/?e=76fc145c69&u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=2a0f1460eb)
---
| | [ ](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=28fa49470d&e=76fc145c69)
---
| |
---
| Hey Derek-
---
| I don’t know if you all saw this but Progressives got beaten up pretty badly on Tuesday here in Virginia. Am I upset by that? Of course I am, I personally put a lot of heart and soul into the campaign for the candidate I was working for. Am I confused by it? Not even the slightest.

Virginia politics is a cruel and unrelenting mistress. And we all paid the price for it. But you know what? I would rather lose us 1000 times while holding onto our morals and values and fighting for what I believe in than to sell out once and win.

[But we need a united Progressive movement to push forward.](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=544dae1b37&e=76fc145c69)

We worked day in and day out. For candidates up and down the ballot. We got some wins. However, I think the losses outweigh what we have gained. What we ended up with statewide was the same old situation as we have had for decades. And why is that?

Lack of Education on the Issues.

We can continue to yell at ourselves internally in our silos until we are blue in the face but we cannot rely on a few small spurts of energy every other year and expect things to go the way we want it to. We just can’t.

[What we have to do, what we must do, is organize our communities around these issues.](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=65656d2ec1&e=76fc145c69) It is not enough to just put up candidates and hope for the best in odd years. We have to be out there and be loud about it. We cannot assume. Assuming that people see what we see as a problem doesn’t work. That’s what we saw yesterday. We ran in our own lanes trying to get stuff done. We split votes. We fired at ourselves and for what? The old guard thrives on a divided Progressive movement. It’s how they continue to reign. But what does that also mean? Listening to one another. Teamwork together. Not being a hero. No one man is an island and that is true for everyone. No one is exempted from that. We cannot continue to say that only one of us will be the one to save the movement. But we must unite to make sure that we elect Progressives while holding those in office accountable

[Let's coalesce and come together. The people united will never be defeated. ](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=388b550fab&e=76fc145c69) Keep up the good work. Don’t agonize, organize.
---
|

Matt Royer

---
| | | | | | | [](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=5930c496e7&e=76fc145c69)

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: They called the American flag “disturbing”
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
As a veteran, I am appalled. I served our great nation in Afghanistan and proudly wore the American flag on my shoulder. When I stopped an Islamic ter As a veteran, I am appalled. I served our great nation in Afghanistan and proudly wore the American flag on my shoulder. When I stopped an Islamic terrorist armed with a gun, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition on a Paris-bound train, I PROUDLY said I was American and stood up for freedom. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=bbe3679513cb4f5a99f8d192142b412c&_e=7kwmX3rnMfFzDBz_RuXzogWrt2AaQcdZfkUjLM4VdOXSiZukYPcGsA_ipdzI4PdLKvUGfrbKR-YF2JyUs6srZwhNQ1zPPrAbfAiY1keo0rUMFbplSEQhNvXJ99-wjoRUe2-RZqSFU0B9QMg4Pmy8fMThijOW2dZep-VLruuKDFxiygYSWrsGX93U_IhWf_RXJgnbnrFSnMlLxkJO9xkgLr-cJtuhBr8uX86JSWHOx_bal0BM0RCOCwIRudh5vKOeKG8KdoTXaufUq5JaDjVkYf1-FkW6_UELpIhIxvEkDY0N6nS9F2eYkrCg08ygZBT36-rAyPabBbBlWOpAkYMkaXiEMKzhN2RzOrg-NhtCXz6o-71kGEGQ8iHXdOYT2dQmhyzK5UDxUToCVPK8ufgF2wlpXg-lHsaF_jDmqJ_ri-stffG4JAu3Exx6q_K09Kj6)
---
Peter,

Earlier this week, we celebrated Flag Day. It’s the day in which our country’s first American flag was made official. It should have been a day of patriotism and pride, but the Left disagreed..

**Just a few days ago, a Leftist MSNBC contributor said she was _“disturbed”_ to see _“dozens of American flags”_ flown in New York.**

[](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=bbe3679513cb4f5a99f8d192142b412c&_e=7kwmX3rnMfFzDBz_RuXzogWrt2AaQcdZfkUjLM4VdOXSiZukYPcGsA_ipdzI4PdLKvUGfrbKR-YF2JyUs6srZwhNQ1zPPrAbfAiY1keo0rUMFbplSEQhNvXJ99-wjoRUe2-RZqSFU0B9QMg4Pmy8fMThijOW2dZep-VLruuKDFxiygYSWrsGX93U_IhWf_RXJgnbnrFSnMlLxkJO9xkgLr-cJtuhBr8uX86JSWHOx_Yd6nheU5CKql6COHx565tc06PSJZv1PynSLLRsRqf_cIp_Ytfzz0IX-iY_OHrnAoYWZdpGMOxpCZpxES5DJRF8QD45WKjgFYpJCgDT-GcDDMeluGkV8t1JX6f8a6AaDYVZoDQdQH8V5XnDnCt9eOxFUCvGk6oc-HWYzjWuG-sjxtQYuE7VDWl5mIU9uLuZadlxNlFygx1r08JW95ra6Jyg)
As a veteran, I am appalled. I served our great nation in Afghanistan and proudly wore the American flag on my shoulder. **When I stopped an Islamic terrorist armed with a gun, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition on a Paris-bound train, I PROUDLY said I was American and stood up for freedom.**

The American flag I wore while fighting overseas and still proudly fly on my front porch represents this:

[](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=bbe3679513cb4f5a99f8d192142b412c&_e=7kwmX3rnMfFzDBz_RuXzogWrt2AaQcdZfkUjLM4VdOXSiZukYPcGsA_ipdzI4PdLKvUGfrbKR-YF2JyUs6srZwhNQ1zPPrAbfAiY1keo0rUMFbplSEQhNvXJ99-wjoRUe2-RZqSFU0B9QMg4Pmy8fMThijOW2dZep-VLruuKDFxiygYSWrsGX93U_IhWf_RXJgnbnrFSnMlLxkJO9xkgLr-cJtuhBr8uX86JSWHOx_aNTtV84o4lhodl76UaND-52OPb4UCIQGXPLN7DILaAPWw3943Xw7xry-5pukoZgRmCogXsrkohr6JVtFPgk3FWNqKnzZeDyBPWQhDWBFNJpBQVKvCO6--sJw0R07saPCi5h6IS_lNSX75VXnn-dXUFTmCpR3HLua92BmBOiwY0r-WEGqzfVW5AXeT_8B9Y_VtPh15ajTeLcii0xb2H0RSi)
**Red for hardiness and valor.
_White_ for purity and innocence.
Blue for vigilance, perseverance and justice.**

This flag represents freedom, something I will never stop fighting for - **[especially when I get to Congress.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=bbe3679513cb4f5a99f8d192142b412c&_e=7kwmX3rnMfFzDBz_RuXzogWrt2AaQcdZfkUjLM4VdOXSiZukYPcGsA_ipdzI4PdLKvUGfrbKR-YF2JyUs6srZwhNQ1zPPrAbfAiY1keo0rUMFbplSEQhNvXJ99-wjoRUe2-RZqSFU0B9QMg4Pmy8fMThijOW2dZep-VLruuKDFxiygYSWrsGX93U_IhWf_RXJgnbnrFSnMlLxkJO9xkgLr-cJtuhBr8uX86JSWHOx_ben3Z7zombzAf-_ahYi-Ggmqoi3WJUnKCYhh-aeSbW_0HnE8vK_I_E1RhJGXlNAgAuMUPD8WfutkF-BDANUlYQc2TT1gtnsvYUpWuHl8un_Hr3rTQ22-oAy7AkOLdIk5L2takzSpyorkJkceBMYng_f_E5RjvbatJ6KXLTB9LZRpVFas39vFt8HAU92YtH80Yrf7-REP7MzxBehAgVSPrl)**

Peter, our nation is on a trajectory that cannot be sustained. The radical-Left wants everyone to believe America is racist and horrible. They refuse to see us for the great nation we are - for the country the world seeks to imitate. **[That is why we need more patriots in Washington to fight against the anti-American agenda.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=bbe3679513cb4f5a99f8d192142b412c&_e=7kwmX3rnMfFzDBz_RuXzogWrt2AaQcdZfkUjLM4VdOXSiZukYPcGsA_ipdzI4PdLKvUGfrbKR-YF2JyUs6srZwhNQ1zPPrAbfAiY1keo0rUMFbplSEQhNvXJ99-wjoRUe2-RZqSFU0B9QMg4Pmy8fMThijOW2dZep-VLruuKDFxiygYSWrsGX93U_IhWf_RXJgnbnrFSnMlLxkJO9xkgLr-cJtuhBr8uX86JSWHOx_aqMGfkjbmQNJ95GhMbw7cHgRYYeus6n7foWdMMqRU4t8KaZ8SwuvxPy2osxkQ61uxT9Xmti6ZOdLFzbXdNQRmQaA5EWfdjdHCNjVFNO74lV7NBZVoN9J7lfxc5_1Y6PUh9wb5ACXX_e6KqhkNjPUzkX5daXYsgCHL-gqWbM9urCMkx5HMbHB8fbxWmwMLZM8h1okdL2-Tyg2QNITX52-Ud)**

When I stopped an Islamic terrorist armed with a gun, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition on a Paris-bound train, I PROUDLY said I was American and stood up for freedom. | Peter, Earlier this week, we celebrated Flag Day. It’s the day in which our country’s first American flag was made official. It should have been a day of patriotism and pride, but the Left disagreed.. Just a few days ago, a Leftist MSNBC contributor said she was “disturbed” to see “dozens of American flags” flown in New York. As a veteran, I am appalled. I served our great nation in Afghanistan and proudly wore the American flag on my shoulder. When I stopped an Islamic terrorist armed with a gun, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition on a Paris-bound train, I PROUDLY said I was American and stood up for freedom. The American flag I wore while fighting overseas and still proudly fly on my front porch represents this: Red for hardiness and valor. White for purity and innocence. name: Great America Update
subject: BREAKING: Video service refuses to host our videos!
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c144%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=PYkGFFScrQsUXxc%2bcjjCig&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4558%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JUB1P%2f3XCP9ymRlXxhGm0w&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4558%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JUB1P%2f3XCP9ymRlXxhGm0w&sysid=1) Despite Big Tech’s relentless censorship campaign against us, PragerU’s ideas will continue to break through and shape millions of young minds. When YouTube began restricting 200+ “dangerous” PragerU videos a few years ago--including our series on The Ten Commandments--we took matters into our own hands and our viewership quadrupled! **Thanks to supporters like you, PragerU had the funding to innovate and build our own streaming infrastructure.** Instead of embedding (often restricted) videos from YouTube on our website, mobile app, and streaming TV channels, we hosted them natively using a video player software company called JW Player. Every time we’ve hit a wall, we’ve been able to find a way around it. But now, we are facing a serious new threat. Just as our contract was coming up for renewal, JW Player informed us they had updated their “community guidelines.” They announced they won’t be renewing our contract as they claim that “PragerU’s content is misleading.” PragerU pressed for more information. Which videos did they feel were misleading? What kind of methods were they using to fact-check information? Is this decision final? In their words: “...the primary basis for our decision was related to the prohibition of misleading content...based on the nature of the violations, I don’t see a viable path forward...” **[Give Today to Help PragerU Gain Independence from Big Tech!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4559%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GqKYiBrZIWA9C0m8I0HESA&sysid=1)** In cowardly fashion, they refused to give specifics and hid behind third party “fact-checkers” to purge PragerU as a client. Meanwhile, JW Player’s current clients include left-wing media outlets like The Young Turks and Vice! These companies produce thousands of videos using politically-charged narratives that divide our country and teach young folks to resent America. [**Now, even PragerU’s own platforms are under attack.** We call on you again, our wonderful supporters, to stand by us! ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4550%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UnKXgdNMrSGTt3WLcDf1iA&sysid=1) What’s at stake is Freedom of Speech and Freedom of Information. Without these freedoms, the America we love will not exist for our children and grandchildren. [Donate Now](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4551%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=e3O0w7R7p2AJMz7huJtckw&sysid=1) **Rest assured, we’re already working on a solution to keep our videos online. Now we need your support TODAY to WAKE AMERICA UP to the dangers of online censorship while we develop alternative technologies --for greater independence from Big Tech Tyranny.** **[Please give today to keep our videos reaching and changing millions of young minds! ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4552%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TKAX2vf8SFsuesqCmCqAUQ&sysid=1)** We cannot do this alone, Your PragerU Team | |
---
**Help us fight back against Big Tech censorship. Donate today.**

Peter, I have an exciting development.

**I have officially been endorsed by Former Secretary of State Mike Pompeo!**

[](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=3eb76a235fe54a21a188398008af9cd2&_e=zeT1RYMvUicw39zc72gewu2mzbtp377ZdzU9yR2Pb921ym1p7FTGVohI_jka5rr9yBbYisXBw8u8q38nfp54vDucPpOVBleOKEbaVtpzOcTgLzja1-Rxaew9BmJ9Eb-LYyIkLMONYSV2Wq37NveAhumAlZpxUI7H-79M4hgy0dUP9rAHFFANZnrMVcLRsAgnafLNDG642dTVDWfKJ3LvSWhWB2R5kUVi9T-asrJBjClm7ONz1D3LxgJ4mfmAFw0ThEA5yHyPskFVp9R6cP9pgMUHCpYlwhGQqltbhZbnh2AujcjnBadXDgs0ebpsxK-ncFZzsEe4ldGhlVXdjHbzOatb-xVpU5lMTFjAPr4WfL-15I41-s5G9JHdN1NbzBDX9UpKUBwQIkz4xhwT1-Vn4IswBjm_brP9SGEfX5Krf-t5ZV0hHiXBKGEZYmHNU7cOJ2IDohBvUbXM_rKOmopOLhbHXkWN-ALbqFdzBIaSGgDQj09WDQmpuERI22x0A-SP)

From Army veteran, to Congressman, to CIA Director, to Secretary of State, Secretary Pompeo has been fighting for American values his entire career and has been a real leader for an America first agenda. **I'm truly honored to have his support!**

body:
Winning a presidential year election is pretty damn hard. But winning a midterm election? That’s even harder.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210617-1779-header&t=1&akid=1779%2E434096%2EQA2Z-8)
Winning Democratic majorities in the House and the Senate during a presidential election year is pretty damn hard.
But protecting our Democratic majorities during a midterm election? That’s even harder.
**We must elect John Fetterman to the U.S. Senate and protect our razor-thin Democratic majority in the 2022 midterm elections. Just look at the data from previous election years:**
🙁 Each of the past 4 presidents have lost majorities in Congress during the midterm elections.
😖 On average, the party holding the White House loses 3 Senate and 22 House seats during the midterm elections.
😫 7 out of the last 8 times a chamber flipped, it was during the midterm elections, not during a presidential year.
Yikes. If reading all that makes you want to do this....
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20368?refcode=em20210617-1779&t=2&akid=1779%2E434096%2EQA2Z-8)
**...then please, Peter, take direct and immediate action right now. We can only defy the odds, win this race, and deliver Pennsylvania for working families if we do it together.**
[**Will you donate your first $5 to John Fetterman for U.S. Senate? We CAN’T afford to lose even a single Senate seat during the upcoming midterm elections, and polling indicates that John is the *only* candidate who can win Pennsylvania and deliver another seat to our razor-thin Democratic majority.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20368?refcode=em20210617-1779&t=3&akid=1779%2E434096%2EQA2Z-8)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20368?refcode=em20210617-1779&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1779%2E434096%2EQA2Z-8)**
Peter, there is truly so much at stake in the upcoming midterm elections. Thanks for hearing us out, and thanks for your continued support.
More soon,
Team Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210617-1779-footer&t=23&refcode2=1779_434096_QA2Z-8&akid=1779%2E434096%2EQA2Z-8)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
