This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

clean_body: Winning a presidential year election is pretty damn hard. But winning a midterm election? That’s even harder. Winning Democratic majorities in the House and the Senate during a presidential election year is pretty damn hard. But protecting our Democratic majorities during a midterm election? That’s even harder. We must elect John Fetterman to the U.S. Senate and protect our razor-thin Democratic majority in the 2022 midterm elections. Just look at the data from previous election years: 🙁 Each of the past 4 presidents have lost majorities in Congress during the midterm elections. 😖 On average, the party holding the White House loses 3 Senate and 22 House seats during the midterm elections. 😫 7 out of the last 8 times a chamber flipped, it was during the midterm elections, not during a presidential year. Yikes. If reading all that makes you want to do this.... ...then please, Peter, take direct and immediate action right now. We can only defy the odds, win this race, and deliver Pennsylvania for working families if we do it together. Peter, there is truly so much at stake in the upcoming midterm elections. Thanks for hearing us out, and thanks for your continued support. More soon, Team Fetterman HQ | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

clean_body: Hi Peter, Moms for Katie Porter set an ambitious goal to raise $10,000 by the end of this month to defend Katie's seat and to keep our Democratic House majority. The GOP is raising massive amounts of money to flip this district. Are you surprised? We are not. With champions like Katie in the House and the American Families Plan, we have a once in a generation opportunity to deliver meaningful change on behalf of American working families. = With President Biden in the White House and a Democratic Senate and House Majority, we can pass paid family leave and make sure that nobody has to choose between a pay check or spending time with a newborn. Here is the good news--for the first time in American history, we have a sitting president who introduced a national paid leave policy. Here is the not so good news. We are coming up short and without your help today, we will not reach our fundraising goal at the end of this month. = Peter, I am reaching out to you today ahead of the FEC deadline at the end of June because donations from supporters like you are critical funding for us. =. name: Senator Maggie Hassan
subject: My friend Joyce
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Hi there, New Hampshire has a proud tradition of taking democracy seriously -- regardless of whether it's a Presidential election or local and down-ballot races. One race I really want to call your attention to is for Mayor of Manchester. My friend Joyce Craig was elected Mayor of Manchester after promising to help the Queen City reach its full potential. And in her first two terms, she’s delivering. **[Will you please join me in supporting her campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30972490/291205638/1889251642?refcode=e20210617_JC&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWVkNmE3MC1iNGNmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9_jyWvPLsoNLqE8rnSIRlPYRzeIETO3G6ShmA3vuytQ=)** As Mayor, Joyce led the city through the COVID-19 pandemic, making smart financial decisions to protect taxpayers and generating a $1.85 million surplus. She also established the Manchester Small Business Recovery Loan Program and the Small Business Resiliency Grant, resulting in assistance to 53 small businesses. **[The work Joyce is doing in Manchester impacts all of us across the state, and she needs our help. Can Joyce count on you to make a $5 contribution today to ensure she wins this year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30972491/291205639/1889251642?refcode=e20210617_JC&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWVkNmE3MC1iNGNmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9_jyWvPLsoNLqE8rnSIRlPYRzeIETO3G6ShmA3vuytQ=)** Joyce’s campaign is building the infrastructure and momentum necessary to make sure Democrats win up and down the ballot. Your contribution will help make that future success possible. With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: The Fairness Project
subject: BIG news from the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Fairness Project
body:
Americans everywhere want more health care, not less.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30972646/291206066/175817611?refcode=em0617_espy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzEwNDUxOS1iNWNmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h4lsWDHcXtZ3VfEhpM0xE7Me44hP0R8nRoHvGFKKjF4=) Hi team, This morning, the Supreme Court ruled 7-2 to uphold the Affordable Care Act. **Radical Republican extremists have waged a war on the Affordable Care Act for more than a decade now, and today they lost yet again.** We’re proud to have expanded Medicaid in 6 red and purple states when politicians refused to act -- and today’s news is a huge victory for the over 20 million Americans who have care thanks to the ACA. At The Fairness Project, we’re especially celebrating with folks in Missouri, Oklahoma, Nebraska, Utah, Idaho, and Maine who organized, campaigned, and voted to expand Medicaid coverage to over 830,000 of their friends and neighbors. **We are so proud to have been a part of those 6 winning campaigns to change hundreds of thousands of lives.** _The Supreme Court upholding this law highlights how Americans everywhere -- Democrats and Republicans, in red and blue states -- want more health care, not less._ **But there’s a lot more work ahead of us. Radical politicians are still attacking health care. And we’re still working to expand Medicaid in states where partisan politicians refuse to get it done.** **[Can you chip in $20 today in honor of the 20 million people who still have health care thanks to today’s ruling -- and to help us keep winning campaigns to build on Obamacare and expand health care to those in need?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30972647/291206067/175817611?refcode=em0617_espy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzEwNDUxOS1iNWNmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h4lsWDHcXtZ3VfEhpM0xE7Me44hP0R8nRoHvGFKKjF4=)** | **[Donate →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30972648/291206068/175817611?refcode=em0617_espy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzEwNDUxOS1iNWNmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h4lsWDHcXtZ3VfEhpM0xE7Me44hP0R8nRoHvGFKKjF4=)**

Paid for by The Fairness Project. Thank you for supporting The Fairness Project. Your unwavering support helps us bring economic fairness to millions of Americans and put power directly in the hands of voters through ballot initiatives. The Fairness Project has won 20 ballot initiatives since 2016, changing the lives of nearly 18 million people by raising the minimum wage, expanding access to health care, capping payday lending, and winning paid leave. And we're just getting started. If you would like more ways to keep in touch and stay involved, please consider following us on [Facebook](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30972651/291206076/-200381251?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzEwNDUxOS1iNWNmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h4lsWDHcXtZ3VfEhpM0xE7Me44hP0R8nRoHvGFKKjF4=&emci=db810980-b4cf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=ac104519-b5cf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=561582) and [Twitter](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30972652/291206087/602506525?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzEwNDUxOS1iNWNmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h4lsWDHcXtZ3VfEhpM0xE7Me44hP0R8nRoHvGFKKjF4=&emci=db810980-b4cf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=ac104519-b5cf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=561582). clean_body: Americans everywhere want more health care, not less. | = Hi team, This morning, the Supreme Court ruled 7-2 to uphold the Affordable Care Act. Radical Republican extremists have waged a war on the Affordable Care Act for more than a decade now, and today they lost yet again. We’re proud to have expanded Medicaid in 6 red and purple states when politicians refused to act -- and today’s news is a huge victory for the over 20 million Americans who have care thanks to the ACA. At The Fairness Project, we’re especially celebrating with folks in Missouri, Oklahoma, Nebraska, Utah, Idaho, and Maine who organized, campaigned, and voted to expand Medicaid coverage to over 830,000 of their friends and neighbors. We are so proud to have been a part of those 6 winning campaigns to change hundreds of thousands of lives. The Supreme Court upholding this law highlights how Americans everywhere -- Democrats and Republicans, in red and blue states -- want more health care, not less. But there’s a lot more work ahead of us. Radical politicians are still attacking health care. And we’re still working to expand Medicaid in states where partisan politicians refuse to get it done. = | = Thanks, The Fairness Project Paid for by The Fairness Project. Thank you for supporting The Fairness Project. Your unwavering support helps us bring economic fairness to millions of Americans and put power directly in the hands of voters through ballot initiatives. The Fairness Project has won 20 ballot initiatives since 2016, changing the lives of nearly 18 million people by raising the minimum wage, expanding access to health care, capping payday lending, and winning paid leave. And we're just getting started. If you would like more ways to keep in touch and stay involved, please consider following us on and . Your partnership allows us to make all this possible. If you'd like to donate to help fund our efforts, please =. Funds raised will be used to support ballot measures, on-the-ground efforts, and other advocacy activities in support of working families. name: Congressman Matt Gaetz
subject: Anthony Sabatini = the RINOs worst nightmare
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001chvfJZOVd02kicVW6NtbFj6BFFuwp_fsbs8qw-U3C_X2u3zlPsjwjrh5pIERaXdtkPkjB1EnR3PNvd7KCir_PfUwqFC-Pdssesy_IlNn53pxtF2ZTiK1kXn41ZZNFJuASD_4bbRjsRtQiCcopFlAnkXHAMttKwgw8iAsdrebI9kd6170GmSyLIZGsjF4FS7G5kCfHwWGd6w=&c=bIugMveU4LzpDK5dGMqhCaESCUNkxvhVZgSv3dsSVCBs4Bp5ESOCUA==&ch=kkQkWyKIwBi_p2PIBjZaWirOYeW4tcricinOgFvLpu7CAGWl9DvT0A==)

| Peter,
I need help in DC. The swamp is out of control and I need PROVEN allies to join me in Congress.
My friend Anthony Sabatini is a proven Trump Republican.
He's stood by my side since day 1 when it comes to putting America First.

* Anthony has a 100% voting record with the American Conservative Union in the Florida state legislature.
* He introduced a bill to name Florida's longest highway the "President Donald J. Trump Highway."
* He battles the RINO establishment and the Marxist democrats day and night... and he wins.
* He is a consistent voice speaking out to end state lockdowns, unmask our kids, and stop vaccine passports.
* He is a proven conservative fighter.

And now he's aiming to join me in Congress representing Florida's 7th District. This is why I'm endorsing Anthony Sabatini for his Congressional campaign against Stephanie "Marxist" Murphy.
I'm asking you, as an America First patriot... to donate directly to Anthony's campaign. You can donate by [clicking on the link here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001chvfJZOVd02kicVW6NtbFj6BFFuwp_fsbs8qw-U3C_X2u3zlPsjwjrh5pIERaXdtkPkjB1EnR3PNvd7KCir_PfUwqFC-Pdssesy_IlNn53pxtF2ZTiK1kXn41ZZNFJuASD_4bbRjsRtQiCcopFlAnkXHAMttKwgw8iAsdrebI9kd6170GmSyLIZGsjF4FS7G5kCfHwWGd6w=&c=bIugMveU4LzpDK5dGMqhCaESCUNkxvhVZgSv3dsSVCBs4Bp5ESOCUA==&ch=kkQkWyKIwBi_p2PIBjZaWirOYeW4tcricinOgFvLpu7CAGWl9DvT0A==) 100% of your donation will go directly to Anthony's campaign. No portion will go to RINOs or the party establishment. You see, I hear from candidates all of the time about their intentions to be conservative and to fight for the America First platform. So many Republicans know how to say the right things, but when it comes time for action... when it comes time to fight the liberal media... when it comes time to actually represent WE THE PEOPLE... they are nowhere to be found.
But not Anthony.
He is a proven conservative fighter.
He is battle-tested. And if we're going to win this battle, I need him by my side in Congress. His race is a BATTLEGROUND for Republicans to take back the house. Do not let Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and AOC control the future of America. [Click here to rush an urgent donation to Anthony Sabatini's campaign and let's WIN! ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001chvfJZOVd02kicVW6NtbFj6BFFuwp_fsbs8qw-U3C_X2u3zlPsjwjrh5pIERaXdtkPkjB1EnR3PNvd7KCir_PfUwqFC-Pdssesy_IlNn53pxtF2ZTiK1kXn41ZZNFJuASD_4bbRjsRtQiCcopFlAnkXHAMttKwgw8iAsdrebI9kd6170GmSyLIZGsjF4FS7G5kCfHwWGd6w=&c=bIugMveU4LzpDK5dGMqhCaESCUNkxvhVZgSv3dsSVCBs4Bp5ESOCUA==&ch=kkQkWyKIwBi_p2PIBjZaWirOYeW4tcricinOgFvLpu7CAGWl9DvT0A==)

name: John Burke
subject: It’s about MORE than reopening
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2021
body:
Kevin Faulconer knows what California really needs to turn Newsom’s mess around. Read more >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/be42c7a333b6f391/bb3c1598bded7a92c3d6b838967d376c/34943) Peter, California is officially “reopened,” but we still have a long way to go to get completely back on track. After more than a year of Newsom’s unscientific lockdowns — not to mention more than a decade of one-party rule in Sacramento — it’s going to take more than a day for a real California Comeback. Kevin Faulconer took a quick break from the campaign trail this week to talk with Heather Holmes of KTVU, and discuss what it’s really going to take to make California the land of Golden Opportunity once again. [**< < CLICK HERE TO WATCH & SHARE >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/be42c7a333b6f391/be2b4cf0682aedc2c3d6b838967d376c/34943) Californians are clamoring for new leadership at the top — that’s why we were able to turn in over 2 million signatures on the recall petition this spring, and why the Recall Election _will happen_ in 2021. Make sure that we elect a proven leader to replace Gavin Newsom this fall. We need to do more than just reopen. We need to rebuild and reform, and there is only one candidate in the race with a real plan and the experience necessary to make it happen. Please help us share Kevin’s message of a California Comeback by **[sharing this video](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/be42c7a333b6f391/797f05b231722656c3d6b838967d376c/34943)** on Facebook or Twitter, or even just by forwarding this email to friends and family. Thanks for your help spreading the word,
John Burke, Communications Director | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/be42c7a333b6f391/ba8428169438e002c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/be42c7a333b6f391/5d8f005c7e42825ec3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/be42c7a333b6f391/f6ae18db461c6d9ac3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/be42c7a333b6f391/fb7a8b16aed983bbc3d6b838967d376c/34943)

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Sign the petition: Call on POTUS to restore our national monuments
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
Add your name next to mine: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30975219/291214304/-272948131?refcode=MTH_em_20210617_X_ENG_NM_X_ACT_US_all_all_NM_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTQ5MjA2NC1iZGNmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m-nQFZFMoc9bCQmwzu0QkF19ojkL4LiNsrEaGCh42EI=&emci=77492064-bdcf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7a492064-bdcf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)
---
Nearly four years ago, the Trump administration made the unprecedented move of drastically shrinking Bears Ears and Grand Staircase-Escalante national monuments. **It was the largest attack on public lands in American history and a direct attack on sacred lands and tribal sovereignty.** I spent years putting together guided backpacking trips into this amazing landscape and I can tell you it is one of the most important cultural landscapes on Earth. If any place deserves to be a national monument, Bears Ears does. It’s past time we restore protections and begin to repair this damage. And now we have ample opportunity to do just that. Interior Secretary Deb Haaland just recommended that President Biden expand the boundaries at our Bears Ears and Grand Staircase-Escalante national monuments. This would be a _huge_ step forward — preserving millions of acres of federal land for generations to come. [**Thanks to the _Antiquities Act,_ President Biden has the power to protect and restore these monuments. Will you sign my petition calling on POTUS to act immediately to repair the Trump administration’s damage and preserve our public lands?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30975220/291214305/-46003678?refcode=MTH_em_20210617_X_ENG_NM_X_ACT_US_all_all_NM_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTQ5MjA2NC1iZGNmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m-nQFZFMoc9bCQmwzu0QkF19ojkL4LiNsrEaGCh42EI=&emci=77492064-bdcf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7a492064-bdcf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045) | [SIGN THE PETITION →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30975221/291214306/-46003678?refcode=MTH_em_20210617_X_ENG_NM_X_ACT_US_all_all_NM_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTQ5MjA2NC1iZGNmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m-nQFZFMoc9bCQmwzu0QkF19ojkL4LiNsrEaGCh42EI=&emci=77492064-bdcf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7a492064-bdcf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)
---
Our public lands are meant for the public — not to be tampered with and sold to the highest bidder. I will always fight to protect them. Thank you for speaking out along with me.
— Martin
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
---
Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. name: Heidi St. John
subject: My Private Meeting with President Trump
body:
It was the honor of a lifetime.
---
| | | | | |
---
|
---
| It was the honor of a lifetime to have a private meeting with President Trump yesterday. He is as warm in person as you could imagine--sharp, engaging and charismatic. What a privilege it was to speak with him. His passion for this country and our district has not waned.
He took almost an hour and heard my concerns about what is happening in SW Washington. He remains committed to the fight for freedom in the United States and in our district in particular. He is not done fighting for this country and I am prepared to continue this fight. I am excited and looking forward to our next visit.
President Trump's agenda was the right agenda for America: --protecting children in the womb --giving parents control in their child's education --protecting our country's border --establishing fair trade practice and business protection that benefits our district and protects our jobs
Like the President, I love this amazing country, especially Southwest Washington State, where I have lived and served my community for nearly 20 years. I know this district and I will be a powerful voice for the things you care about.
We have a huge fundraising goal to make by June 30 and I need your help. Please donate today to help send me to DC where I can be your voice for school choice, election reform, border security and a return to common sense. We need common sense in Washington DC and I am the only candidate to deliver.
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Crucial Contribution Deadline
---
| We're fast approaching a very important deadline for the campaign. June 30th ends the second quarter for campaign fundraising and we are so close to our goal! Every dollar helps.

clean_body: It was the honor of a lifetime. | | | | | | | | It was the honor of a lifetime to have a private meeting with President Trump yesterday. He is as warm in person as you could imagine--sharp, engaging and charismatic. What a privilege it was to speak with him. His passion for this country and our district has not waned. He took almost an hour and heard my concerns about what is happening in SW Washington. He remains committed to the fight for freedom in the United States and in our district in particular. He is not done fighting for this country and I am prepared to continue this fight. I am excited and looking forward to our next visit. President Trump's agenda was the right agenda for America: --protecting children in the womb --giving parents control in their child's education --protecting our country's border --establishing fair trade practice and business protection that benefits our district and protects our jobs Like the President, I love this amazing country, especially Southwest Washington State, where I have lived and served my community for nearly 20 years. I know this district and I will be a powerful voice for the things you care about. We have a huge fundraising goal to make by June 30 and I need your help. Please donate today to help send me to DC where I can be your voice for school choice, election reform, border security and a return to common sense. We need common sense in Washington DC and I am the only candidate to deliver. | | | | | Crucial Contribution Deadline | We're fast approaching a very important deadline for the campaign. June 30th ends the second quarter for campaign fundraising and we are so close to our goal! Every dollar helps. I’m Jose Castillo, an American-First conservative from Florida working tirelessly to flip a blue seat RED and take back Congress from the radical Democrats. The survival of America depends on us electing Republicans.

| [**MAKE CONGRESS REPUBLICAN AGAIN »

**This is an all-hands-on-deck effort.** Democrats have the fake news media and big tech on their side to censor Republican voices and stop any momentum we gain. **_And they know I’m a threat because I go against their bogus narrative that Republicans are just old white men._**

I was born in New Orleans but raised by a strong single mother in Honduras. She instilled deep-rooted conservative values in our family. Growing up in Central America, I witnessed how corruption and big government devastate families and businesses. Our country is headed in the wrong direction right now. We need to cut taxes and create more jobs, secure our borders, and support a strong military.

**_That’s why before June 30th my team and I have set a goal of finding 2,022 committed conservatives to pledge their support to take back Congress_** and defeat my radical progressive opponent, who is nothing more than a puppet for Pelosi and Biden’s insane liberal agenda. The Democrats will be prepared to spend whatever it takes to stay in control. They will lie and smear our records every chance they get. But the future of our nation is at stake. If Congress is Republican again, we can: ✅ Secure our borders ✅ Protect the unborn ✅ Create more jobs ✅ Ensure election integrity ✅ PUT AMERICA FIRST Let’s work together and give it all we’ve got to Thank you, Jose Castillo Republican for Congress | | PAID FOR BY JOSE CASTILLO FOR CONGRESS Jose Castillo for Congress PO Box 2651 Davenport, FL 33836 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? H.R. 1 will expand Vote by Mail, restore the Voting Rights Act, and strengthen the power of people over wealthy special interests. [**_With H.R. 1 in the Senate, we need all hands on deck! Click here to take action - whether it’s calling your Senator or joining a phone bank - to help Democrats pass this vital bill!_**](https://t.dripemail2.)

body:
I’m honored to have so many people in Washington state and across the country standing with me in the fight to defend this seat and protect (and grow!) our Democratic majority in 2022.
#
Peter,
I’m honored to have so many people in Washington state and across the country standing with me in the fight to defend this seat and protect _(and grow!)_ our Democratic majority in 2022.
**Today, I have a special request to make of my top supporters like you, Peter.**
**[As we look forward to the end of the quarter, we need to work hard to make sure we have the resources we need to keep Washington state blue. Will you pitch in $5 or any amount now -- and consider making it a monthly donation to keep fueling this fight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30976555/291218574/-1819552169?refcode=pm_em_210617_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODQ1MzY0NC1jM2NmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OP2O8xRsEATB6Gw0ivXEscRs2AEuxQMgXm-TfctI1ig=)**
I’m doing everything I can in the other Washington to make progress on issues like paid leave, child care, affordable health care, and so much more. But I can’t win these fights without support. I need a strong Democratic majority with me in the Senate fighting for our values day in, day out.
I need each and every one of you with me, too. If this grassroots team stands together, I know we can come out on top in the fight for the Senate.
**[Peter, will you rush in a $5 contribution -- and consider making it monthly?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30976556/291218575/-1819552169?refcode=pm_em_210617_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODQ1MzY0NC1jM2NmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OP2O8xRsEATB6Gw0ivXEscRs2AEuxQMgXm-TfctI1ig=)**
Thank you,
Patty

**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30976557/291218576/-1819552169?refcode=pm_em_210617_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODQ1MzY0NC1jM2NmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OP2O8xRsEATB6Gw0ivXEscRs2AEuxQMgXm-TfctI1ig=)**

name: Susie Lee
subject: Happy Pride!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30976751/291219131/-1528880522?refcode=SL_headerlogoAB&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDViY2VmNi1jM2NmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r3e5rVH8NZk0Or5JLayd5xhX0d38KOcisOm-noQyOw4=)

| | Happy Pride Month! **This month gives us an opportunity to celebrate our LGBTQ+ friends, family and neighbors. It also gives us a chance to recognize the work of trailblazers who have come before us and the work still to be done to ensure equality for all.** _Today, that starts with passing the Equality Act._ If passed, the Equality Act would amend the Civil Rights Act to **prohibit discrimination on the basis of sex, sexual orientation, and gender identity** in employment, housing, public accommodations, education, federally funded programs, credit, and jury service. This piece of legislation is long overdue. It passed through this House with Susie’s support, but it’s being held up by Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans. It is time to take action to pass the Equality Act — for our friends, or family, and our country. **[Will you add your name to show your support for advancing the fight for equality by passing the Equality Act?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30976752/291219132/1825486363?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDViY2VmNi1jM2NmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r3e5rVH8NZk0Or5JLayd5xhX0d38KOcisOm-noQyOw4=&emci=d0ab4946-25cd-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d45bcef6-c3cf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=10997957)** | | | [ADD MY NAME: I support the Equality Act →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30976753/291219133/-55570706?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDViY2VmNi1jM2NmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r3e5rVH8NZk0Or5JLayd5xhX0d38KOcisOm-noQyOw4=&emci=d0ab4946-25cd-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d45bcef6-c3cf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=10997957)

Hey friend,

June is an extremely important month for our campaign. At the end of June, we’ll close the books on this fundraising quarter, and we’ll send a report to the FEC about where we stand. Everyone will know how many folks have chipped in to our campaign, and they’ll know if we have the resources we need to win.

This is the most important deadline of our campaign, and we’re going to need a lot of support to make it happen.

[**That’s why we’re asking you today: Can you chip in $10 or whatever you can afford to help stay on track and build our grassroots momentum? Deadlines like these are no joke, and we need to make sure we’re ready.** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30976845/291219387/2031134326?refcode=em_fr_2021.06.17_b1_ohhq_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGIzOTE1Zi1jNGNmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ALaHIZDSoQicTPqi8D7DzjxsFaT51ttQOgcELpQCsEE=)

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Help defeat Marco Rubio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=hR443aKq37i6%2FN8z9FJTFb9sy6Nqe%2B%2BU&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
I have very exciting news to share: Congresswoman Val Demings recently announced she's running for U.S. Senate in Florida.
CNN is already projecting that Florida is one of the top Senate seats most likely to flip blue - but incumbent Marco Rubio, backed heavily by Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump, is going to spend massive sums of money (we're talking tens of millions of dollars) to attack Congresswoman Demings and keep Florida reactionary and red.
Florida is in play, Friend: The last Senate election in the Sunshine State was decided by just 0.12 percentage points. We can win this. But Congresswoman Demings is going to need every bit of grassroots support to win - so I told her our team would help her raise $10,000 by midnight tonight. Can I count on you to give?
**[Rush a donation of $5 or more now to help Val Demings defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue, and protect Senate control.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rb4vd?refcode=jtk1040-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500) **
If you're already familiar with Congresswoman Demings' record, I wouldn't be surprised. She is one of the toughest, most hardworking public servants we've got in Congress - and she's exactly the sort of champion Floridians need in the U.S. Senate. She served as an impeachment manager and prosecuted the corrupt former president. She has fought relentlessly for gun safety reform. And after a 27 year career as a police officer capped by four years as the first-ever woman chief of the Orlando department, Val Demings can handle herself, and will not back down to anyone when it comes to representing Floridians.
She has dedicated all of her professional life to serving others and getting results. She knows what it takes to serve both her community and her state.
Compare that with the record of Marco Rubio - a so-called leader who has only grown more extreme and loyal to Donald Trump by the day - and well, the choice is pretty clear, Friend.
But just because the choice is clear doesn't mean Florida's Senate race is going to be easy. Political experts are already calling it one of the biggest battleground races in the country - and they say that it could be the most expensive, too. **That's why we need to raise $10,000 before midnight tonight to help build a movement strong enough to take on these special interests and flip this critical Senate seat - and I'm personally asking you to step up with your support today.**
**[Make a contribution of $5 or more- whatever you can spare for this battleground Senate race - to help Val Demings win in Florida and defeat Marco Rubio. ](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rb4vd?refcode=jtk1040-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500) **
Thank you very much,
Dick
[ Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rb4vd?refcode=jtk1040-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ux%2BiCsyyPD6r0pWSkf7emL9sy6Nqe%2B%2BU&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: What Bernie and I are fighting for RIGHT NOW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Exciting news, Medicare expansion could be included in a giant Senate package.
#
Peter,
As our work to pass Medicare for All continues, my friend Bernie Sanders and I are fighting for the transformative reforms that we can pass under President Biden.
Bernie is working with Majority Leader Schumer RIGHT NOW on a huge Democratic bill that includes measures for infrastructure spending, combating climate change, raising corporate taxes, AND expanding and improving Medicare.
**Bernie and I have been fighting to lower the Medicare eligibility age and expand coverage to dental, vision, and hearing for months. We’re also pushing to finally lower the costs of prescription drugs.** We have momentum but now we need to keep fighting to make sure our historic expansion of health care gets in this big bill and we make it law.
[**The health insurance lobby and Big Pharma will do everything they can to stop Medicare expansion. We need to stand together and fight back if we want to get this done. Can you chip in $3 today to fuel our work to pass historic health care legislation?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210617?refcode=em20210617-383&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&refcode2=383_420207_vrvbDB&akid=383%2E420207%2EvrvbDB)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210617?refcode=em20210617-383&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=383_420207_vrvbDB&akid=383%2E420207%2EvrvbDB)**
Here’s what Bernie and I are fighting for:
* **Lowering the Medicare eligibility age:** This would immediately extend coverage to at least 23 million people, including many who lost insurance during the pandemic.
* **Improving Medicare benefits to finally cover dental, vision, and hearing care, and cap out-of-pocket costs:** This will give folks on Medicare much needed coverage to see the dentist, get hearing aids, and afford a new pair of glasses.
* **Empowering Medicare to negotiate drug prices for everyone:** The U.S. spends far more than any other country on prescription drugs, despite Medicare Part D being the largest purchaser. We need the government to use its power to negotiate drug prices down for everyone.

This is huge (or “yuge,” if you’re Bernie), and will help us pave a path to winning Medicare for All. **[So please, Peter, chip in $3 or anything at all so we have the resources necessary to fight the powerful interests that want to stop transformative health care reform. We can expand and improve Medicare, but only if we’re united and ALL IN for this fight.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210617?refcode=em20210617-383&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=383_420207_vrvbDB&akid=383%2E420207%2EvrvbDB)**
Thank you so much for your support,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210617-383-footer&t=22&refcode2=383_420207_vrvbDB&akid=383%2E420207%2EvrvbDB)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=383%2E420207%2EvrvbDB)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=383%2E420207%2EvrvbDB)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

Unfortunately for Biden and Pelosi, the Republican Party is completely united - especially right here in New Jersey - against their Radical Socialist agenda. That 's why I'm asking you to join me in supporting Republicans throughout New Jersey in our FIGHT for A STRONG AMERICA and to TAKE BACK THE HOUSE from Speaker Pelosi and Radical Left. The road to a Republican House Majority depends on us winning critical swing districts here in New Jersey. Will you invest $25 or more today to provide Republicans throughout New Jersey with the resources we desperately need to TAKE BACK THE HOUSE? Let 's show Biden, Pelosi, and the Radical Left that Republicans are united to WIN in 2022. Thank you, Jeff Van Drew ** ** **Would you like to stay in touch with Team Van**Drew?**** ** Follow us on ** ** ** ** ** **** Paid for by Van Drew for Congress. If you would prefer not to receive future emails, PO BOX 671 CAPE MAY COURT HOUSE, NJ 08210 **** ********

name: Erica Smith
subject: I have an important announcement to make
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Lord knows we can’t count on the DSCC, so let’s make a deal....
#
Hi, it’s Erica. I just chatted with our finance team, and I have an important announcement to make:
**Our campaign has officially set a goal of 500 contributions between now and the end-of-quarter FEC fundraising deadline on June 30!**
As a reminder, June 30 is when I’m required by federal law to report how much our scrappy North Carolina campaign raised in Q2. Once our numbers go public, anyone will be able to see our fundraising numbers and make judgements about the viability of our campaign — _and you can bet that everyone will see, from Donald Trump to Chuck Schumer and Jeff Jackson._
We absolutely must reach 500 more contributions before June 30 through emails like this one in order to show the strength of our grassroots movement and have a fighting chance at winning our primary. I know I’ve been emailing you humbly asking for money a lot, but Lord knows we can’t count on the DSCC or the Democratic establishment for any help.
So let’s make a deal. I’m respectfully asking for you to hear me out:
[**If you make your very first donation of $5 or more to our campaign to help us reach our critical FEC fundraising goal, we’ll send you a FREE campaign sticker. But act fast because our sticker stock is limited. Are you in?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2893?refcode=em20210617-185&t=1&akid=185%2E3698%2EPR4ySJ)
**[Contribute $5 »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2893?refcode=em20210617-185&t=2&akid=185%2E3698%2EPR4ySJ)**
**[Claim your free sticker »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2893?refcode=em20210617-185-2&t=3&akid=185%2E3698%2EPR4ySJ)**
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2893?refcode=em20210617-185&t=4&akid=185%2E3698%2EPR4ySJ)
We can absolutely reach our goal and post an impressive Q2 fundraising number, because I know how dedicated this team is. Now let’s prove to the public and to the FEC just how dedicated we are.
[**Will you make your very first donation of $5 to our campaign today to help reach our goal of 500 contributions before our FEC deadline? Donate now, and we’ll send you your free sticker shortly.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2893?refcode=em20210617-185&t=5&akid=185%2E3698%2EPR4ySJ)
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210617-185-footer&t=6&refcode2=185_3698_PR4ySJ&akid=185%2E3698%2EPR4ySJ)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=7&akid=185%2E3698%2EPR4ySJ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=185%2E3698%2EPR4ySJ)

body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57755181:6xT1UwlN3:m:1:3253819041:BC7D3182EF81F885522496D98DC24044:r "MEMO") Peter: I believe that it is essential that the American people know the truth about what is going on in their government, and it is clear they aren't getting the truth from the media. Chuck Schumer has his _" Big, Bold Agenda,"_ and it's about to unfold right before our eyes. **[I need your help to stop him before he uses his socialist agenda to destroy America.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57755181:6xT1UwlN3:m:1:3253819041:BC7D3182EF81F885522496D98DC24044:r "I need your help to stop him before he uses his socialist agenda to
destroy America.")**
* **_Chuck has a plan_** **to secure a permanent Democrat Majority by destroying our nation's election integrity.**
* **_Chuck has a plan_** **to place your family at the whims of the Antifa mobs by defunding the police.**
* **_Chuck has a plan_** **to abandon the nation of Israel to appease the Squad**
* **_Chuck has a plan_** **to outlaw your right to own a firearm - any firearm**
* **_Chuck has a plan_** **to sell our nation's future to Communist China**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57755181:6xT1UwlN3:m:1:3253819041:BC7D3182EF81F885522496D98DC24044:r "Headline")_Chuck Schumer is so worried about AOC running against him in the New York Senate Primary that he is doing all he can to win over progressives. He doesn't care if he completely tears down everything we love about this great nation._ And if you dare to stand up against Chuck's plan, _you will be silenced_. The media will shout you down as a racist, and you WILL be canceled. **[NO MORE. We must resist the socialist takeover of America.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57755181:6xT1UwlN3:m:1:3253819041:BC7D3182EF81F885522496D98DC24044:r "NO MORE. We must resist the
socialist takeover of America.")** I have been fighting, and even I was unprepared for how swift my punishment was. The media sent a _Washington Post_ reporter to my childhood home to talk to people I went to middle school with about my work in the U.S. Senate. **_It might be funny if it wasn't so creepy._** | | [STAND WITH JOSH](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57755181:6xT1UwlN3:m:1:3253819041:BC7D3182EF81F885522496D98DC24044:r "STAND WITH JOSH")

**If they are waiting for me to give up, they are going to be disappointed. They will be even more disappointed when they see my fundraising report after the upcoming end-of-quarter deadline.**
**[Fighting for your rights is why I'm here in Washington, and I won't give up until we put an end to Chuck Schumer's Big, Bold Agenda. won't give up until we put an end to Chuck Schumer's Big, Bold Agenda. Will you donate before June 30th so I can send shockwaves through the Democrat
establishment?")**
As the left and their friends in the media keep up their attacks on me, Chuck Schumer will throw out the filibuster and trample all over our Constitution to pass an agenda more progressive than anything FDR proposed.
**_We must stand and fight. I'm here doing my part, and I need your help._ [Are you with me?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57755181:6xT1UwlN3:m:1:3253819041:BC7D3182EF81F885522496D98DC24044:r "Are you with me?")**
For America,

They’ve even called scenes of rolling flames and violent clashes “mostly peaceful.” Friend, I’m concerned that the mainstream media has fully abandoned the truth, and I need your help to do something about it. If you agree, I need you to help me make a statement by chipping in to my campaign to help spread our message for all to hear. Do You Agree that the Liberal Media is Biased Against Conservatives? Email: | | How can our nation continue to rebuild, heal, and come together if the sources of our information continue to mislead? Kansans deserve the truth. By chipping in right now, you’ll help fund key communication efforts – to get our conservative message out to the Kansans who need to hear it the most. –Derek Schmidt | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

name: Patrick Morrisey
subject: Media Advisory for AG Patrick Morrisey
body:
| | | | In a statement following Tuesday's decision, West Virginia Attorney General Patrick Morrisey...
---
---
### **MEDIA ADVISORY**

Dear Peter,
The Center Square – A judge temporarily blocked the federal government from enforcing a section of an executive order from President Joe Biden that prevents new oil-and-gas leases on federal land and offshore waters after a 13-state coalition, which included West Virginia, filed a lawsuit.
U.S. District Judge Terry Doughty issued an injunction that prevents enforcement pending the outcome of the lawsuit. The injunction applies nationwide, not only in the states that filed the lawsuit.
In a statement following Tuesday's decision, West Virginia Attorney General Patrick Morrisey said this is the first victory against the president to protect energy jobs for West Virginians and all Americans. He said there are many victories to come.

clean_body: | | | | In a statement following Tuesday's decision, West Virginia Attorney General Patrick Morrisey... MEDIA ADVISORY Dear Peter, The Center Square – A judge temporarily blocked the federal government from enforcing a section of an executive order from President Joe Biden that prevents new oil-and-gas leases on federal land and offshore waters after a 13-state coalition, which included West Virginia, filed a lawsuit. U.S. District Judge Terry Doughty issued an injunction that prevents enforcement pending the outcome of the lawsuit. The injunction applies nationwide, not only in the states that filed the lawsuit. In a statement following Tuesday's decision, West Virginia Attorney General Patrick Morrisey said this is the first victory against the president to protect energy jobs for West Virginians and all Americans. He said there are many victories to come. "Read More >>" Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey West Virginia Attorney General | Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Morrisey 2020, Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Justice for Abuela! Absolutely!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
AOC is full of it |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=4f8ca45a69&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

I think we have all had it with AOC. She's a first class fraud.

Last week, she levelled some serious accusations at President Trump (who hasn't been in office for over 5 months), that he slowed down relief aid to Puerto Rico.

It's the same false accusation that my opponent, Democrat Darren Soto, has levelled many times against President Trump. It was untrue coming from him, and it's equally untrue coming from AOC!

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=dd0d43c89d&e=afa21b7626), Florida’s 9th District. It's currently held by Democrat Darren Soto, a Pelosi stooge. I nearly beat him last year, and I intend to finish the job this time!**

So, AOC made her accusation by posting photos of her Abuela's home, still unrepaired.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=c176460a5a&e=afa21b7626)
---
| __**The only problem? Trump hasn't been President for 5 months! She doesn't lay a bit of blame at Biden's feet, does she?**__

**The other problem, of course, is that instead of waiting for government to help, she herself could have helped her Abuela with her $200k/year salary as a Congresswoman. After all, AOC has a posh loft in DC, another in her district, and drives a Tesla.**

A conservative blogger actually raised over $100,000 for AOC's Abuela, to repair her home. AOC refused it.

Her attempt to use her Abuela to try to dunk on President Trump was a lie, and despicable.

Now, why does this matter? Because my district has a large Puerto Rican community. The Dems, including my opponent, desperately want to blame President Trump for a lack of aid- but in reality, the island's corrupt government couldn't get its own act together!

_The U.K. Daily mail visited “abuela” Clotilde Rivera‘s home this week and was able to speak with a woman at the residence who claimed to be the New York Democrat’s aunt.

Assertions that Mr. Trump’s administration denied Hurricane Maria relief — and is therefore responsible for an unrepaired home — were challenged by the Puerto Rican relative.

“I am her aunt,” she told the website, while declining to share her full name. “We don’t speak for the community. ... _It’s a problem here in Puerto Rico with the administration_ and the distribution of help. It is not a problem with Washington. _We had the assistance and it didn’t get to the people_.”_

_Help me get to Congress, and I'll demand accountability from PR's corrupt liberal government. And we will get aid to the people who need it- and prove AOC wrong, once again!_

I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and nearly beating the incumbent Darren Soto. _I gave him a scare that almost beat him! I am back to finish the job this cycle, starting earlier and I need your help!_

We need congressmen who will FIGHT AOC, not JOIN her. [Can you help me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=2b09da2acb&e=afa21b7626)

The Dems must go! [Help me demand accountability and protect our freedoms!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=d7d0511d43&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=7210857b0e&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=d09041bcac&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=d4d6df29ab&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

You can [update your preferences](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=8cc78c7a29) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=8cc78c7a29).

| OFFICIAL GOP COMMUNICATION
---
| **\- From the Desk of Mike Pompeo -**
70th Secretary of State I wanted you to be one of the first to know about our new organization - CAVPAC - which is focused on pushing back against the radical Left and doing everything in our power to Champion American Values.

When President Trump asked me to become his Secretary of State, I knew it would be an incredible opportunity to make a difference in the lives of so many Americans and to advance the conservative agenda. And that’s exactly what I did.

As a member of the Trump Administration, we secured the border, stood up to Iran, stopped China from stealing American jobs, and stood tall in defense of religious freedom. As President Trump’s top negotiator, I traveled the globe to make the world respect the United States again. We talked the talk and walked the walk.

Now, our nation stands at a crossroads. I have no intention to sit on the sidelines and let the Democrats ruin all the progress we made. It’s absolutely critical to the future of our great nation and the Republican Party that we double down our efforts to protect American values. **That’s why I’ve started my new organization with one mission: Champion American Values. **

If you know me, you know I’m not one to back down in the face of attacks from the radical Left or the mainstream media. With the radical Left imposing their anti-police, pro-tax, big government, socialist agenda on the American people, it’s more important now than ever that we unite to elect conservatives who are willing to stand up for religious freedom, pro-life values, the Second Amendment, a stronger military and the America First agenda.

With CAVPAC, I’m dedicating as many resources as possible to electing principled conservatives all across the country who are willing to stand up to Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden. clean_body: | | | | | | OFFICIAL GOP COMMUNICATION | \- From the Desk of Mike Pompeo - 70th Secretary of State I wanted you to be one of the first to know about our new organization - CAVPAC - which is focused on pushing back against the radical Left and doing everything in our power to Champion American Values. When President Trump asked me to become his Secretary of State, I knew it would be an incredible opportunity to make a difference in the lives of so many Americans and to advance the conservative agenda. And that’s exactly what I did. As a member of the Trump Administration, we secured the border, stood up to Iran, stopped China from stealing American jobs, and stood tall in defense of religious freedom. As President Trump’s top negotiator, I traveled the globe to make the world respect the United States again. We talked the talk and walked the walk. Now, our nation stands at a crossroads. I have no intention to sit on the sidelines and let the Democrats ruin all the progress we made. It’s absolutely critical to the future of our great nation and the Republican Party that we double down our efforts to protect American values. That’s why I’ve started my new organization with one mission: Champion American Values. You’ve been identified as a top patriot and ally in our fight, so I’m extending you an EXCLUSIVE Founding Member opportunity, but only if you act by 11:59 TONIGHT. "CHIP IN $500 TO BECOME A FOUNDING MEMBER >>>" "CHIP IN $250 TO BECOME A FOUNDING MEMBER >>>" "CHIP IN $100 TO BECOME A FOUNDING MEMBER >>>" "CHIP IN $50 TO BECOME A FOUNDING MEMBER >>>" "CHIP IN $25 TO BECOME A FOUNDING MEMBER >>>" If you know me, you know I’m not one to back down in the face of attacks from the radical Left or the mainstream media. With the radical Left imposing their anti-police, pro-tax, big government, socialist agenda on the American people, it’s more important now than ever that we unite to elect conservatives who are willing to stand up for religious freedom, pro-life values, the Second Amendment, a stronger military and the America First agenda. With CAVPAC, I’m dedicating as many resources as possible to electing principled conservatives all across the country who are willing to stand up to Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden. We must take back the House and Senate for Republicans, but I can’t do it alone.Can I count on you to become a Founding Member in our fight? | | With you on our side, I’m confident we can champion American values and take back both the House and Senate. "Make your Founding Member donation before Midnight to help me show the Left that we’re a force to be reckoned with >>>" Never Give an Inch, | Mike Pompeo 70th Secretary of State, Trump Administration | | | | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | | | PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES. body:
Latest Press Release from Joe Kent | | | |
---
| | | **DATE: June 17, 2021**
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Contact: Byron Sanford ** **Cell: 360.210.6943**
[**byron@joekentforcongress.com**](mailto:byron@joekentforcongress.com)
---
|
####
# **Opposition to Washington’s K-12 Mask Mandates, Social Distancing and Testing Guidance**

In response to concerns that the Washington Department of Health is mandating face coverings, social distancing and COVID-19 testing in schools, Joe Kent made the following statement.
---
| “For the past year, the government subjected our children to unnecessary and extreme measures with no basis in science, including mask mandates and shutting down in-person schooling.

The Department of Health requirement for children to wear masks in schools, mandating social distancing, and requiring unvaccinated children to be frequently tested for COVID-19 is an unconstitutional overreach of our state government and is not backed up by any medical research.

As a parent of two young school children, I stand with all of the parents of the Third Congressional District, Washington state, and across our country in demanding the removal of these draconian restrictions.”

Joe Kent is available for interviews. If interested, please email Byron Sanford at [byron@joekentforcongress.com](mailto:byron@joekentforcongress.com) or contact him via cell at 360.210.6943.

###

Fellow Conservative -

I know how far away the midterm election seems, but the truth is, the Democrats are acting like it is TOMORROW. **The Democrat Machine is building a robust ground campaign in Arizona right now, doing the early work needed to defeat me in 2022.**

[**That's why today, I am reaching out to every valuable member of the American conservative movement, asking that they endorse my campaign for re-election immediately.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=23e342712bd942cea81dbec36b96658e&_e=K3I8TVx-2_ZnlriOoGF0HrlZLzWcVDH5G2v5NZvrv_hFDNXMOwS7HuQSd9GQrP92yx-0WXdQuNA4xPeEBoxzGAP925Eug_RxLuuPNW73VK0MubZvws_1s8xsLeZNUJvBa27MWtE2c1kHLxQY2V3sgtW7Cm3auQP7QtPwhDe0qyGPKsLTQ_tp6OEMJvjgQQIxUUg75NPG7yXMerZ3sRMBAz0jwsygHLY-6EGVKRXNwyxzh-vD18GwJGAfyqh39p6IVGISTSz5XoaRHHLpXdkFOoz2yHxn-AXncBMirur_brjsy3FxzH1ApKQXAVR00LjQEffC6Qt_NDKx55eE98PnVrPnhfDtxHnUrFKM-MC4nFJQLq0GgeGJN7GnpmzmZyqKNdKkiIs34Qgr1WfgoO6ZS5pQLKaaCLI-ZjTC8jp4B9qvim-78BM3P9Ag0rl5CCmfyLkri-urZ274dlwRGnBI-1VZ6zkX-wSz2PlrlxGzvk435RIlo_4_2UduzAXDStVaKE3IH3MuGPAEDdX6oLK_yQmYyZDrPELdHFSM763kTSmeRHyTObDM6V3ZipUzj6zN)

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=23e342712bd942cea81dbec36b96658e&_e=K3I8TVx-2_ZnlriOoGF0HrlZLzWcVDH5G2v5NZvrv_hFDNXMOwS7HuQSd9GQrP92yx-0WXdQuNA4xPeEBoxzGAP925Eug_RxLuuPNW73VK0MubZvws_1s8xsLeZNUJvBa27MWtE2c1kHLxQY2V3sgtW7Cm3auQP7QtPwhDe0qyGPKsLTQ_tp6OEMJvjgQQIxUUg75NPG7yXMerZ3sRMBAz0jwsygHLY-6EGVKRXNwyxzh-vD18GwJGAfyqh39p6IVGISTSz5XoaRHHLpXdkFOoz2yHxn-AXncBMirur_brjsy3FxzH1ApKQXAVR00LjQEffC6Qt_NDKx55eE98PnVrPnhfDtxHnUrFKM-MC4nFK89BjsyqZnptPgpJ5SretLjppqUusQ6Gu20CznAugtDZeRTw_ugf5BuUMB-Dj3rrb_ZKs-AEwefssxZuHY7hfBmfB4AosA7wGaIohsGDBZROsDsE2NHN6FtNXBYyEY03CErTRoLpEUHpcTR6NaT5XHJ_RRhuD-pDgbpxUoRlXjBpkVujPi-AZ9-E1s2SH9DjULXPifgIJkXKcSZ2nhjEyV)
In 2018, I defeated the Democrats in not one but TWO close races, first in a Special Election and then again in November. Then, I defeated the Democrats in 2020 - despite their ability to flip remaining parts of Arizona blue.

**This was a huge accomplishment that took a lot of hard work and grassroots financial support,** [**especially from supporters like you.** ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=23e342712bd942cea81dbec36b96658e&_e=K3I8TVx-2_ZnlriOoGF0HrlZLzWcVDH5G2v5NZvrv_hFDNXMOwS7HuQSd9GQrP92yx-0WXdQuNA4xPeEBoxzGAP925Eug_RxLuuPNW73VK0MubZvws_1s8xsLeZNUJvBa27MWtE2c1kHLxQY2V3sgtW7Cm3auQP7QtPwhDe0qyGPKsLTQ_tp6OEMJvjgQQIxUUg75NPG7yXMerZ3sRMBAz0jwsygHLY-6EGVKRXNwyxzh-vD18GwJGAfyqh39p6IVGISTSz5XoaRHHLpXdkFOoz2yHxn-AXncBMirur_brjsy3FxzH1ApKQXAVR00LjQEffC6Qt_NDKx55eE98PnVrPnhfDtxHnUrFKM-MC4nFIGTHAsgiRoYliQvpr4JoiYUS47KTj5rBfho2uufsXVeQPjuzrn-3U81kCAK_cTeSYMD01VACPWXsdGIcswByyubLB9HntTdrfIlwKY2EKbp4CeC7zkKsteLX1x3xg2ZXb3f9m-HLQu6zOYFGsHTmNMfqKwADawUAXLGL56N_r9d4GeIjvq0AuH2LSN2bj6Tqmmb3LLiF0_0LQuh2wuS46h)

The Democrat Machine is building a robust ground campaign in Arizona right now, doing the early work needed to defeat me in 2022. In 2018, I defeated the Democrats in not one but TWO close races, first in a Special Election and then again in November. Then, I defeated the Democrats in 2020 - despite their ability to flip remaining parts of Arizona blue. This was a huge accomplishment that took a lot of hard work and grassroots financial support, My conservative voice and presence in Washington have never been more important than it is right now, Fellow Conservative. I am actively challenging the most radical presidency in American history, which is why the Democrats have identified me as the Republican to beat in November. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: If Gazelka Sells Out, Walz Wins
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=if_gazelka_sells_out_walz_wins&n=1)
---
Peter \-- I'll keep this short... **A series of[Fake End Powers Bills](https://www.action4liberty.com/bahr_sandstede_pelowski_offer_fake_end_powers_bills_today?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=if_gazelka_sells_out_walz_wins&n=2) were introduced this week, one that even stole the name of Mort's Never Again Bill. Meanwhile, the power brokers in St Paul are behind closed doors, cutting the final deals on a budget. If Gazelka sells out on passing Mort's Never Again Bill before passing a budget, Walz wins!** There's simply nothing more important than Ending Walz' Emergency Powers and making sure it Never Happens Again. But the political class is doing everything they can to derail this movement. On Monday, for the first time in 15 months, we were able to come face to face with these legislators as the fence around the Capitol came down. The Never Again Protest was a HUGE success. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_protest_was_a_huge_success?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=if_gazelka_sells_out_walz_wins&n=3) Over the last two month, our teams have knocked on **13,000 doors** and made **over 50,000 calls** to put pressure on legislators. **Thanks to you, Ending Walz' Emergency Powers has been heightened to the top of the list of issues in the budget showdown. But we're not done yet.** Since summer began, we've noticed a drop in donations to fund our important field operations. I'm afraid without more support, we won't be able to get this past the finish line. Don't let our enemies win! Support our growing team of young, liberty professionals who work around the clock for your liberties. **Please help us with a donation today. Build the resources my team needs to defeat the political class and their never ending emergency powers, mask mandates, and vaccine passports.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=if_gazelka_sells_out_walz_wins&n=4 "DONATE NOW!") [DONATE NOW!](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=if_gazelka_sells_out_walz_wins&n=4)
---
_Time is running out. Please help support the dooknocking, phone calling and digital ad campaigns that we use to bring the heat on politicians in St Paul._
[**Peter, don't let Governor Walz hold onto his Unilateral Emergency Powers any longer! Donate $25, $50 or $100 immediately to keep the pressure on the political class.**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=if_gazelka_sells_out_walz_wins&n=5)

****
**Jake Duesenberg**

body:
I beat the Left in 2021, now on to 2022 |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c3ff74dd30&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

If I’ve learned anything over the last week it’s this:

**They can try what they want, but they can’t fight freedom.**

What do I mean by that?

_I have been targeted, attacked, and smeared for my conviction in the Election Integrity Movement. The Left doesn’t like what they see._

**And we just proved to everyone that you can’t mess with freedom.**

My name is Mark Finchem. I am a proud Trumpian Conservative, the ORIGINAL “Election Integrity” Conservative, a former police officer, paramedic, first responder, Arizona State Representative and leader in the Arizona business community.

**I am the candidate Trump called “a strong leader,” am endorsed by Bernard Kerik, and I have the wind at my sails in my campaign for Arizona Secretary of State!**

[_Donate TODAY to protect America’s and Arizona’s elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ac13c04257&e=44b8c466b0)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=57ef9abd4a&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| We are leading a tremendous grassroots movement to fight the election steal, and stop the Democrats in their tracks as they plot their next attack on Democracy!

[**But we are coming up on the quarter-end fundraising deadline and I need ALL the support we can get, if we can ever HOPE of keeping elections in Arizona sacred!**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5778500c45&e=44b8c466b0)

If I can help engineer America’s Audit in Maricopa County, imagine what I could do as Secretary of State of Arizona!

[Donate as much as you can to send a message to Democrats that you can’t fight freedom and you can’t steal elections!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2904c3ae05&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0db76e51e8&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **_The Recall effort against me and against freedom has FAILED!_**

Yes, you heard that right.

**The baseless accusations have been thwarted and now I am free to focus all of my energy on fighting for America’s elections!**

_The Gateway Pundit writes:_

_The recall effort for Rep. Mark Finchem fails. Free speech lives in Arizona. Finchem can now focus on the Secretary of State Race – Because God knows Arizona is ready for a person of integrity in that office._

_In spite of official public records regarding the truth about Representative Finchem’s advocacy for our First Amendment rights, the so-called “Rural Arizonans for Accountability” group has persisted in promoting their baseless false claims._

_ The lawsuit will come soon enough, but for now, we must protect this Legislative seat from people who are willing to lie to take power. First, they lied to the DOJ and FBI, then they lied to the compliant media, and now they are lying to the constituents of Legislative District 11._

_Lying has become the go-to tactic of the radical leftists. And then they hired BLM and ANTIFA workers to gather signatures. The organization is housed out of the Bolshevik hotbed of Tempe. “The truth is that I was in Washington DC to represent you and your interests in an election that was in controversy and at no time engaged in any unlawful activity. If I had, there would have been an investigation, but there is nothing to back up their fallacious claims,” says Rep. Finchem._

**Like I said earlier, you can try what you want, but you can’t fight freedom.**

_Why would the radical left attack me for trying to provide evidence to Vice President Pence showing evidence of fraud?_

**Because they are scared that the truth will bring them down.**

**_But I have good news for you, friends and patriots, the truth will set us free._**

And that is exactly what we are seeing in the Maricopa Audit right now!

**Bernard Kerik writes in _Newsmax:_**

_Democrats and the mainstream media have been aggressively denouncing the Maricopa County, Arizona election audit from the beginning._

_At, first I didn’t understand why._

_I thought that it was because they were afraid of what the results would be, but I now believe it’s something far worse._
_The Democrats aren’t “just” afraid of the outcome – but they’re afraid that the audit results will be irrefutable and unimpeachable. They know that their efforts to discredit the audit process in Arizona will not stand up to scrutiny and here’s why._

_The Arizona audit is being run impeccably, utilizing security and surveillance procedures with a longstanding track record of effectiveness._

_To say that I was impressed after viewing the audit process for myself would be a massive understatement. I’ve spent decades working in security and law enforcement at the highest levels, and this is exactly the level of conscientiousness and attention to detail that I would demand for a sensitive or high-profile investigation._

**The truth is on our sides.**

**_All I can ask you to do is be patient, have faith, and help me as I fight for you in Maricopa to save our elections!_**
